w742.en: He felt **clumsy** as he knocked over two glasses at the dinner.
w742.zh: 他在晚宴上打翻了兩個杯子，覺得自己很笨拙。

w743.en: Blood begins to **coagulate** quickly once it leaves the open wound.
w743.zh: 血液一旦流出開放的傷口，就會迅速凝結。

w744.en: The surgeon applied a **coagulant** to slow the patient's heavy bleeding.
w744.zh: 外科醫生使用了一種凝血劑來減緩病人的大量出血。

w745.en: The **coalescence** of several small streams formed a single powerful river.
w745.zh: 幾條小溪的合併形成了一條強大的河流。

w746.en: Three smaller parties formed a **coalition** to win the national election.
w746.zh: 三個較小的政黨組成聯盟，以贏得全國大選。

w747.en: Some parents **coddle** their children so much they never learn independence.
w747.zh: 有些父母過度溺愛孩子，以致孩子永遠學不會獨立。

w748.en: She added a short **codicil** to her will to include a new charity.
w748.zh: 她在遺囑中加了一則簡短的附加條款，以納入一個新的慈善機構。

w749.en: No one can **coerce** you into signing this contract against your will.
w749.zh: 沒有人能違背你的意願，強迫你簽署這份合約。

w750.en: The witness claimed her confession had been obtained through **coercion**.
w750.zh: 這名證人聲稱她的供詞是透過脅迫取得的。

w751.en: The regime used **coercive** measures to silence anyone who openly criticised its policies.
w751.zh: 該政權使用強制性的手段，讓任何公開批評其政策的人噤聲。

w752.en: She presented a **cogent** argument that convinced even the most sceptical members of the committee.
w752.zh: 她提出了一個令人信服的論據，連委員會中最持懷疑態度的成員都被說服了。

w753.en: The English word "mother" is **cognate** with the German word "Mutter".
w753.zh: 英文單字「mother」與德文單字「Mutter」是同源的。

w754.en: The managers were fully **cognizant** of the risks before approving the new investment.
w754.zh: 在批准這項新投資之前，經理們已充分察知其中的風險。

w755.en: Her essay failed to **cohere**, jumping randomly between unrelated ideas without clear logic.
w755.zh: 她的文章無法連貫，在不相關的想法之間隨意跳躍，缺乏清晰的邏輯。

w756.en: Strong team **cohesion** helped the group complete the demanding project ahead of schedule.
w756.zh: 強大的團隊凝聚力幫助這個小組提前完成了這項艱鉅的專案。

w757.en: A **cohesive** narrative ties every chapter together into one satisfying and unified story.
w757.zh: 一個有凝聚力的敘事將每個章節結合成一個令人滿意且統一的故事。

w758.en: My holiday plans happened to **coincide** with the start of the music festival.
w758.zh: 我的假期計畫剛好與音樂節的開幕同時發生。

w759.en: By sheer **coincidence**, we both booked seats on the very same flight.
w759.zh: 純屬巧合，我們倆都訂了同一班飛機的座位。

w760.en: The drop in sales was **coincident** with the unexpected rise in fuel prices.
w760.zh: 銷售額的下滑與燃料價格意外上漲同時發生。

w761.en: Several universities **collaborate** with local firms to develop more sustainable packaging materials.
w761.zh: 幾所大學與當地公司合作，開發更永續的包裝材料。

w762.en: The old wooden bridge began to **collapse** under the weight of the lorry.
w762.zh: 這座古老的木橋在卡車的重壓下開始倒塌。

w763.en: The camping table is **collapsible**, so it fits neatly into the boot of any car.
w763.zh: 這張露營桌是可摺疊的，因此能整齊地放進任何汽車的後車廂。

w764.en: My new **colleague** kindly showed me how the office filing system actually works.
w764.zh: 我的新同事好心地教我辦公室的歸檔系統實際上是如何運作的。

w765.en: The villagers made a **collective** decision to repair the road using shared funds.
w765.zh: 村民們做出了集體決定，用共同的資金來修繕這條道路。

w766.en: As a passionate stamp **collector**, he spends weekends hunting for rare editions.
w766.zh: 身為一位熱情的集郵者，他週末都在尋找稀有的版本。

w767.en: Every **collegian** in the dormitory was busy revising for the looming final exams.
w767.zh: 宿舍裡的每個大學生都忙著為迫近的期末考複習。

w768.en: The cyclist swerved sharply to avoid **colliding** with a parked delivery van.
w768.zh: 那位騎自行車的人猛然轉向，以免與一輛停著的送貨車相撞。

w769.en: His grandfather worked as a **collier**, spending long hours deep underground every day.
w769.zh: 他的祖父是一名煤礦工人，每天都在地底深處度過漫長的工時。

w770.en: In **colloquial** English, people often say "gonna" instead of "going to".
w770.zh: 在口語化的英語中，人們常說「gonna」而不是「going to」。

w771.en: The phrase "piece of cake" is a common English **colloquialism** meaning something easy.
w771.zh: 「piece of cake」這個片語是常見的英語口語表達，意思是某件容易的事。

w772.en: After a brief **colloquy**, the two ministers announced a fresh trade agreement.
w772.zh: 經過簡短的正式會談後，兩位部長宣布了一項新的貿易協議。

w773.en: The two firms were fined heavily for **collusion** in fixing market prices.
w773.zh: 這兩家公司因串通操縱市場價格而被處以重罰。

w774.en: The ancient bronze **colossus** towered impressively over the entrance to the harbour.
w774.zh: 這座古代的青銅巨像高聳地矗立在港口入口處，氣勢恢宏。

w775.en: The portrait showed a **comely** young woman with a gentle, thoughtful expression.
w775.zh: 那幅肖像畫描繪了一位秀麗的年輕女子，帶著溫柔而若有所思的神情。

w776.en: The market stalls offered a wide range of fresh **comestible** goods every morning.
w776.zh: 市場攤位每天早上都提供各式各樣可食用的新鮮商品。

w777.en: His **comical** impression of the headmaster made the whole classroom burst into laughter.
w777.zh: 他對校長滑稽的模仿讓整間教室哄堂大笑。

w778.en: A bronze statue was erected to **commemorate** the soldiers who died in the war.
w778.zh: 一座青銅雕像被豎立起來，以紀念在戰爭中陣亡的士兵。

w779.en: The radio **commentary** described each goal with breathless excitement and vivid detail.
w779.zh: 廣播的實況評論以激動萬分的語氣和生動的細節描述了每一個進球。

w780.en: In the recipe, the chef lets the spices **commingle** slowly over a low flame.
w780.zh: 在這道食譜中，主廚讓香料以小火慢慢地摻和在一起。

w781.en: The army's **commissariat** struggled to deliver enough food to the distant front line.
w781.zh: 軍隊的軍需處難以將足夠的食物運送到遙遠的前線。

w782.en: The gallery **commissioned** a local artist to paint a mural on the wall.
w782.zh: 美術館委託一位當地藝術家在牆上繪製一幅壁畫。

w783.en: The company reaffirmed its strong **commitment** to reducing carbon emissions within ten years.
w783.zh: 該公司重申了它對在十年內減少碳排放的堅定承諾。

w784.en: After the hearing, the judge ordered the **committal** of the suspect to custody.
w784.zh: 聽證會後，法官下令將嫌疑人收監。

w785.en: Clean drinking water is becoming an increasingly precious **commodity** in many regions.
w785.zh: 在許多地區，乾淨的飲用水正成為一種日益寶貴的商品。

w786.en: Thousands of workers **commute** into the city centre by train every single morning.
w786.zh: 每天早上都有數以千計的工作者搭火車通勤進入市中心。

w787.en: The two laptops are similar in price and **comparable** in overall performance.
w787.zh: 這兩台筆記型電腦價格相近，整體效能也相當。

w788.en: The study used a **comparative** approach to examine schooling in three different countries.
w788.zh: 這項研究採用比較的方法來檢視三個不同國家的教育情況。

w789.en: In **comparison** with last year, this summer has been remarkably cool and wet.
w789.zh: 與去年相比，今年夏天明顯涼爽且多雨。

w790.en: The airline agreed to **compensate** passengers for the long delay with free vouchers.
w790.zh: 航空公司同意以免費券來賠償乘客所遭受的長時間延誤。

w791.en: Her technical **competence** quickly earned the respect of every engineer on the team.
w791.zh: 她的技術能力很快就贏得了團隊中每位工程師的尊敬。

w792.en: After months of practice, she became thoroughly **competent** at repairing complex machinery.
w792.zh: 經過數月的練習，她變得非常擅長修理複雜的機械。

w793.en: The startup offered **competitive** salaries to attract talented graduates from top universities.
w793.zh: 這家新創公司提供具有競爭力的薪資，以吸引來自頂尖大學的優秀畢業生。

w794.en: Our main **competitor** launched a cheaper product just weeks before our own release.
w794.zh: 我們的主要競爭對手在我們自己的產品發布前幾週推出了一款更便宜的產品。

w795.en: A sense of **complacence** crept in after the team won three matches in a row.
w795.zh: 在球隊連贏三場比賽後，一種自滿的情緒悄悄滋生。

w796.en: After early success, the firm grew **complacent** and ignored its growing competitors.
w796.zh: 在早期取得成功後，這家公司變得自滿，忽視了它日益壯大的競爭對手。

w797.en: His unfailing **complaisance** made him popular, though some found it rather insincere.
w797.zh: 他始終如一的殷勤使他很受歡迎，儘管有些人覺得這相當不真誠。

w798.en: The waiter was so **complaisant** that he cheerfully accommodated every unusual request.
w798.zh: 那位服務生非常殷勤，愉快地滿足了每一項不尋常的要求。

w799.en: A crisp white wine will nicely **complement** the rich flavour of the grilled fish.
w799.zh: 一杯爽口的白酒能很好地襯托出烤魚濃郁的風味。

w800.en: The human brain is a remarkably **complex** organ that scientists still struggle to understand.
w800.zh: 人腦是一個極其複雜的器官，科學家至今仍難以完全理解。

w801.en: The new staff member was quiet, **compliant**, and rarely questioned any instruction given.
w801.zh: 這位新進員工安靜、順從，很少質疑任何給予的指示。

w802.en: Adding too many exceptions will only **complicate** the rules and confuse new users.
w802.zh: 增加太多例外只會使規則複雜化，並讓新使用者感到困惑。

w803.en: An unexpected **complication** during surgery forced the doctors to change their original plan.
w803.zh: 手術過程中一個意外的併發症迫使醫生們改變了原本的計畫。

w804.en: He was arrested for his **complicity** in the elaborate banking fraud.
w804.zh: 他因參與這起精心策劃的銀行詐欺案而被逮捕。

w805.en: She blushed slightly when her teacher paid her a sincere **compliment** on her writing.
w805.zh: 當老師真誠地稱讚她的寫作時，她微微臉紅了。

w806.en: Each **component** of the engine must be tested carefully before final assembly.
w806.zh: 引擎的每個零件在最終組裝前都必須經過仔細測試。

w807.en: Throughout the difficult trial, the witness **comported** herself with admirable calm and dignity.
w807.zh: 在整個艱難的審判過程中，這位證人的舉止表現得令人欽佩地冷靜而有尊嚴。

w808.en: Despite the harsh criticism, she kept her **composure** and answered every question politely.
w808.zh: 儘管遭受嚴厲的批評，她仍保持鎮靜，禮貌地回答了每一個問題。

w809.en: The instructions were clear and **comprehensible**, so even beginners could follow them easily.
w809.zh: 這些說明清楚易懂，因此即使是初學者也能輕鬆遵循。

w810.en: Reading widely greatly improves a student's overall **comprehension** of complicated academic texts.
w810.zh: 廣泛閱讀能大幅提升學生對複雜學術文本的整體理解力。

w811.en: The report gave a **comprehensive** overview of every aspect of the city's transport system.
w811.zh: 這份報告對城市交通系統的各個層面提供了全面的概述。

w812.en: You can **compress** these large image files to save space on your hard drive.
w812.zh: 你可以壓縮這些大型影像檔，以節省硬碟上的空間。

w813.en: Plain text documents are highly **compressible**, often shrinking to a fraction of their size.
w813.zh: 純文字文件具有高度可壓縮性，通常能縮小到原本大小的一小部分。

w814.en: Data **compression** allows the system to store far more files within limited memory.
w814.zh: 資料壓縮使系統能在有限的記憶體中儲存更多的檔案。

w815.en: The committee **comprises** twelve members drawn from a wide range of professions.
w815.zh: 這個委員會由來自各種專業領域的十二名成員組成。

w816.en: He felt a sudden **compulsion** to check that he had locked the front door.
w816.zh: 他突然感到一股難以抗拒的衝動，想確認自己是否鎖了前門。

w817.en: Wearing a seatbelt is **compulsory** for every passenger travelling in the vehicle.
w817.zh: 對於車內每一位乘客來說，繫安全帶都是強制性的。

w818.en: He cheated his partner without the slightest **compunction** or sense of guilt.
w818.zh: 他欺騙了自己的夥伴，卻沒有絲毫良心的不安或愧疚感。

w819.en: The software can quickly **compute** the average rainfall across several decades of records.
w819.zh: 這套軟體能快速計算出數十年紀錄中的平均降雨量。

w820.en: After hours of debate, she finally **conceded** that her original estimate had been wrong.
w820.zh: 經過數小時的辯論後，她終於承認自己最初的估計是錯誤的。

w821.en: His obvious **conceit** about his own talents annoyed nearly everyone in the room.
w821.zh: 他對自己才華顯而易見的自負，幾乎惹惱了房間裡的每一個人。

w822.en: It is hard to **conceive** of a world without electricity or running water.
w822.zh: 很難想像一個沒有電力或自來水的世界。

w823.en: The young pianist performed a demanding piano **concerto** with astonishing skill and grace.
w823.zh: 這位年輕的鋼琴家以驚人的技巧與優雅演奏了一首高難度的鋼琴協奏曲。

w824.en: In a final **concession**, the landlord agreed to lower the monthly rent slightly.
w824.zh: 作為最後的讓步，房東同意稍微調降每月的租金。

w825.en: The mediator worked patiently to **conciliate** the two sides and end the long dispute.
w825.zh: 調解人耐心地致力於調停雙方，以結束這場長期的爭端。

w826.en: In a **conciliatory** gesture, the manager apologised and offered the customer a full refund.
w826.zh: 作為一種和解的姿態，經理道了歉並提供顧客全額退款。

w827.en: The new evidence was **conclusive**, leaving the jury in no doubt about his guilt.
w827.zh: 這項新證據是決定性的，讓陪審團對他的罪行毫無疑問。

w828.en: For many years the two neighbouring tribes lived together in peace and **concord**.
w828.zh: 多年來，這兩個相鄰的部落和睦地共同生活在一起。

w829.en: Scholars consulted the **concordance** to find every passage where that key word appeared.
w829.zh: 學者們查閱了這部詞語索引，以找出那個關鍵字出現的每一個段落。

w830.en: Most experts **concur** that regular exercise significantly reduces the risk of heart disease.
w830.zh: 大多數專家一致認為，規律運動能顯著降低罹患心臟病的風險。

w831.en: The proposal can only proceed with the full **concurrence** of all board members.
w831.zh: 這項提案只有在所有董事會成員完全贊同的情況下才能推進。

w832.en: The judge ordered the two sentences to run **concurrent**, not one after the other.
w832.zh: 法官下令這兩項刑罰同時執行，而非一個接一個地執行。

w833.en: The footballer suffered a mild **concussion** after colliding heavily with an opponent.
w833.zh: 這名足球員在與對手猛烈相撞後，受到了輕微的腦震盪。

w834.en: Each cold morning, **condensation** forms in tiny droplets on the inside of the window.
w834.zh: 每個寒冷的早晨，窗戶內側都會凝結成細小的水珠。

w835.en: The editor asked her to **condense** the lengthy report into a single concise page.
w835.zh: 編輯要求她將這份冗長的報告壓縮成簡潔的一頁。

w836.en: The famous author rarely **condescends** to reply to letters from his ordinary readers.
w836.zh: 這位著名作家很少屈尊回覆普通讀者寄來的信件。

w837.en: The grieving family received hundreds of messages of **condolence** from friends and strangers.
w837.zh: 這個悲痛的家庭收到了來自朋友與陌生人數百封的弔唁訊息。

w838.en: Regular reading from an early age can **conduce** to better language skills later.
w838.zh: 從小養成規律閱讀的習慣，有助於日後培養更好的語言能力。

w839.en: A quiet, tidy room is far more **conducive** to concentration than a noisy one.
w839.zh: 一個安靜整潔的房間遠比吵雜的房間更有利於專注。

w840.en: Copper is highly **conductible**, which is why it is widely used in electrical wiring.
w840.zh: 銅具有高度的可傳導性，這就是它被廣泛用於電線的原因。

w841.en: The electrician ran every cable neatly through a protective plastic **conduit**.
w841.zh: 這位電工將每條電纜整齊地穿過一根保護性的塑膠導管。

w842.en: The small shop sold homemade **confectionery**, from chocolate truffles to brightly coloured boiled sweets.
w842.zh: 這家小店販售自製的甜食，從巧克力松露到色彩鮮豔的硬糖都有。

w843.en: Several small states formed a loose **confederacy** to defend their shared trading interests.
w843.zh: 幾個小國組成了一個鬆散的聯盟，以捍衛它們共同的貿易利益。

w844.en: The police arrested the thief along with his two **confederate** accomplices.
w844.zh: 警方逮捕了這名竊賊以及他的兩名同夥共犯。

w845.en: The directors will **confer** with their lawyers before announcing any final decision.
w845.zh: 董事們會在宣布任何最終決定之前與他們的律師商討。

w846.en: Each **conferee** received a printed schedule listing all of the morning workshops.
w846.zh: 每位與會者都收到了一份印有所有上午工作坊的紙本議程。

w847.en: The old priest had served as a **confessor** to the villagers for many decades.
w847.zh: 這位年邁的神父擔任村民們的告解神父已有數十年之久。

w848.en: She trusted him completely and treated him as her closest **confidant**.
w848.zh: 她完全信任他，並把他當作自己最親密的知己。

w849.en: She finally **confided** her deepest worries to a friend she had known for years.
w849.zh: 她終於向一位相識多年的朋友傾訴了自己內心最深的憂慮。

w850.en: Months of careful preparation gave her the **confidence** to deliver the speech calmly.
w850.zh: 數月的悉心準備讓她有信心沉著地發表那場演講。

w851.en: She felt **confident** that her thorough revision would help her pass the exam.
w851.zh: 她有信心自己徹底的複習能幫助她通過考試。

w852.en: Years of solitary **confinement** had taken a heavy toll on the prisoner's health.
w852.zh: 多年的單獨監禁對這名囚犯的健康造成了沉重的損害。

w853.en: The customs officers will **confiscate** any goods that travellers fail to declare.
w853.zh: 海關人員會沒收旅客未申報的任何物品。

w854.en: A massive **conflagration** swept through the old district, destroying dozens of wooden houses.
w854.zh: 一場大火席捲了這個老城區，摧毀了數十棟木造房屋。

w855.en: The town grew rapidly at the **confluence** of two wide and navigable rivers.
w855.zh: 這座城鎮在兩條寬闊且可通航的河流匯合處迅速發展起來。

w856.en: The smaller stream is a **confluent** that joins the river just below the bridge.
w856.zh: 這條較小的溪流是一條支流，就在橋下方匯入這條河。

w857.en: Every product must be checked for **conformance** with strict international safety standards.
w857.zh: 每件產品都必須檢查其是否符合嚴格的國際安全標準。

w858.en: The new building's design is fully **conformable** to the council's strict planning regulations.
w858.zh: 這棟新建築的設計完全符合議會嚴格的規劃法規。

w859.en: Judges at the show assessed each horse's **conformation** before awarding the final prizes.
w859.zh: 展覽會的評審在頒發最終獎項前評估了每匹馬的外形。

w860.en: The young teacher had to **confront** several difficult students on her very first day.
w860.zh: 這位年輕老師在上班的第一天就不得不面對幾名難纏的學生。

w861.en: As the soup cooled, the fat began to **congeal** on its surface.
w861.zh: 隨著湯逐漸冷卻，油脂開始在表面凝結。

w862.en: We spent a **congenial** evening chatting with our hosts beside the warm fireplace.
w862.zh: 我們在溫暖的壁爐旁與主人們聊天，度過了一個愉快的夜晚。

w863.en: Heavy traffic continues to **congest** the city centre during the busy morning rush.
w863.zh: 繁忙的交通在早晨擁擠的尖峰時段持續使市中心壅塞。

w864.en: Hundreds of birds **congregate** by the lake each evening before settling down to roost.
w864.zh: 每天傍晚，數百隻鳥兒在湖邊聚集，然後才安頓下來棲息。

w865.en: Tall **coniferous** trees, heavy with cones, covered the cold northern mountain slopes.
w865.zh: 高大的結毬果的針葉樹掛滿了毬果，覆蓋著寒冷的北方山坡。

w866.en: Without firm evidence, any explanation of the ruins remains pure **conjecture** about the past.
w866.zh: 在缺乏確鑿證據的情況下，對這些遺跡的任何解釋都只是對過去的純粹推測。

w867.en: The architect chose to **conjoin** the two old cottages into one spacious family home.
w867.zh: 建築師選擇將這兩棟舊小屋連接成一個寬敞的家庭住宅。

w868.en: The novel explores the quiet tensions of their long **conjugal** life together.
w868.zh: 這本小說探討了他們漫長夫妻生活中那些無聲的緊張關係。

w869.en: Students must learn to **conjugate** each irregular verb correctly in all its tenses.
w869.zh: 學生必須學會在所有時態中正確地列舉每個不規則動詞的詞形變化。

w870.en: The grammar lesson focused on the **conjugation** of common verbs in the past tense.
w870.zh: 這堂文法課著重於常見動詞在過去式中的詞形變化。

w871.en: In English grammar, "and" is the most frequently used coordinating **conjunction**.
w871.zh: 在英語文法中，「and」是最常被使用的對等連接詞。

w872.en: Two officials were accused of **conniving** to hide the missing public funds.
w872.zh: 兩名官員被指控密謀隱匿這筆失蹤的公款。

w873.en: As a true **connoisseur** of fine wine, he could identify the vineyard from one sip.
w873.zh: 身為一位真正的美酒鑑賞家，他只需一口就能辨認出葡萄園的產地。

w874.en: For many people, the word "home" can **connote** warmth, safety, and belonging.
w874.zh: 對許多人來說，「家」這個字能讓人聯想到溫暖、安全與歸屬感的內涵。

w875.en: The couple celebrated forty happy years of **connubial** life surrounded by their grandchildren.
w875.zh: 這對夫妻在孫兒的圍繞下，慶祝了他們四十年幸福的婚姻生活。

w876.en: It took the explorers many weeks to **conquer** the highest peak in the range.
w876.zh: 探險家們花了好幾個星期才征服了這座山脈的最高峰。

w877.en: In many cultures, marriage between **consanguineous** relatives is strictly forbidden by law.
w877.zh: 在許多文化中，有血緣關係的親屬之間通婚是被法律嚴格禁止的。

w878.en: His **conscience** would not allow him to keep the wallet he had found.
w878.zh: 他的良心不允許他將撿到的錢包據為己有。

w879.en: She is a **conscientious** worker who always double-checks every detail before submitting reports.
w879.zh: 她是一位盡心盡責的員工，在提交報告前總是再三檢查每一個細節。

w880.en: She was suddenly **conscious** of how quiet the entire library had become.
w880.zh: 她突然意識到整個圖書館變得有多麼安靜。

w881.en: During the war, the government began to **conscript** young men into the army.
w881.zh: 戰爭期間，政府開始徵召年輕男子入伍。

w882.en: The bishop arrived to **consecrate** the newly built village church last Sunday.
w882.zh: 主教上週日前來為這座新建的村莊教堂祝聖。

w883.en: The team won five **consecutive** matches and rose quickly to the top of the league.
w883.zh: 這支球隊連贏了五場比賽，迅速躍升至聯賽榜首。

w884.en: After lengthy discussion, the group finally reached a **consensus** on the new policy.
w884.zh: 經過冗長的討論後，這個團體終於就新政策達成了共識。

w885.en: His natural **conservatism** made him reluctant to adopt any of the new technologies.
w885.zh: 他天生的保守性格使他不願採用任何新技術。

w886.en: Her parents held fairly **conservative** views about marriage, money, and raising children.
w886.zh: 她的父母對於婚姻、金錢和養育子女抱持相當保守的觀念。

w887.en: She trained for years at a famous music **conservatory** in the heart of Vienna.
w887.zh: 她在維也納市中心一所著名的音樂學院受訓多年。

w888.en: The factory will **consign** the finished goods to retailers across the whole country.
w888.zh: 這家工廠會將成品運送給全國各地的零售商。

w889.en: The courier asked the **consignee** to sign carefully for the fragile parcel.
w889.zh: 快遞員請收貨人為這件易碎的包裹仔細簽收。

w890.en: The **consignor** must clearly label each crate before the shipment leaves the warehouse.
w890.zh: 發貨人必須在貨物離開倉庫前，清楚地標記每一個板條箱。

w891.en: Keep stirring the sauce until it reaches a smooth, creamy **consistency**.
w891.zh: 持續攪拌這道醬汁，直到它達到滑順濃稠的黏稠度。

w892.en: She tried hard to **console** her friend after the disappointing exam results.
w892.zh: 在令人失望的考試成績公布後，她努力安慰她的朋友。

w893.en: The training was designed to **consolidate** everything the new recruits had learned so far.
w893.zh: 這項訓練旨在鞏固新進人員目前所學到的一切。

w894.en: There was perfect **consonance** between her values and the goals of the charity.
w894.zh: 她的價值觀與這家慈善機構的目標之間有著完美的一致。

w895.en: His later actions were entirely **consonant** with the promises he had made earlier.
w895.zh: 他後來的行為與他先前所做的承諾完全一致。

w896.en: The queen's **consort** rarely appeared at official ceremonies without her by his side.
w896.zh: 女王的配偶很少在沒有她陪伴在側的情況下出席官方典禮。

w897.en: The bright red sign was deliberately placed in a **conspicuous** spot near the entrance.
w897.zh: 這個鮮紅色的標誌被刻意放在入口附近一個顯眼的位置。

w898.en: The police arrested the main **conspirator** behind the elaborate jewellery robbery.
w898.zh: 警方逮捕了這起精心策劃的珠寶搶案背後的主謀。

w899.en: The rebels secretly **conspired** to overthrow the unpopular government.
w899.zh: 叛軍祕密地密謀推翻這個不得人心的政府。

w900.en: A young **constable** patrolled the quiet village streets late into the night.
w900.zh: 一名年輕的員警深夜在寧靜的村莊街道上巡邏。

w901.en: On clear nights, you can easily spot the famous **constellation** known as Orion.
w901.zh: 在晴朗的夜晚，你可以輕易地找到那個被稱為獵戶座的著名星座。

w902.en: To everyone's **consternation**, the main bridge collapsed just hours before the festival.
w902.zh: 令所有人驚愕的是，這座主橋在節慶前幾個小時就坍塌了。

w903.en: The politician returned home to thank the voters in her own **constituency**.
w903.zh: 這位政治人物返回家鄉，感謝她自己選區的選民。

w904.en: Hydrogen and oxygen are the two main **constituent** elements of ordinary water.
w904.zh: 氫和氧是普通水的兩種主要組成成分。

w905.en: Tight collars can **constrict** the throat and make swallowing slightly uncomfortable.
w905.zh: 過緊的衣領會壓迫喉嚨，使吞嚥稍感不適。

w906.en: The British **consul** helped the stranded tourists replace their lost passports quickly.
w906.zh: 英國領事幫助受困的遊客迅速補辦了他們遺失的護照。

w907.en: After the theft, she went straight to the **consulate** to report her stolen documents.
w907.zh: 竊案發生後，她直接前往領事館報告她被偷的證件。

w908.en: The two artists worked together for years to **consummate** their ambitious shared vision.
w908.zh: 這兩位藝術家共同努力多年，以實現他們宏大的共同願景。

w909.en: The country's huge energy **consumption** continues to rise alongside its growing population.
w909.zh: 這個國家龐大的能源消耗量隨著人口的增長持續上升。

w910.en: Modern society has become increasingly **consumptive**, demanding ever more goods and resources.
w910.zh: 現代社會變得日益消費主義，需要越來越多的商品與資源。

w911.en: Strict isolation measures were introduced to prevent the **contagion** from spreading further.
w911.zh: 嚴格的隔離措施被引入，以防止這種傳染病進一步擴散。

w912.en: Measles is highly **contagious**, so unvaccinated children should avoid crowded indoor places.
w912.zh: 麻疹具有高度傳染性，因此未接種疫苗的兒童應避免前往擁擠的室內場所。

w913.en: Chemical waste from the factory began to **contaminate** the river and nearby farmland.
w913.zh: 來自工廠的化學廢料開始污染這條河流及附近的農田。

w914.en: She is seriously **contemplating** studying abroad for a postgraduate degree next year.
w914.zh: 她正認真盤算著明年出國攻讀研究所學位。

w915.en: The two ancient settlements were **contemporaneous**, sharing similar tools and burial customs.
w915.zh: 這兩個古代聚落是同時期的，擁有相似的工具與喪葬習俗。

w916.en: The gallery showcases striking **contemporary** art created by emerging local painters.
w916.zh: 這家美術館展出由新興本地畫家所創作引人注目的當代藝術。

w917.en: His **contemptible** treatment of the waiting staff disgusted everyone at the table.
w917.zh: 他對待服務人員那種卑劣的態度，令同桌的每個人都感到厭惡。

w918.en: She was openly **contemptuous** of anyone who refused to work as hard as her.
w918.zh: 對於任何不願像她一樣努力工作的人，她都公然表現出輕蔑。

w919.en: The young swimmer is now a serious **contender** for an Olympic gold medal.
w919.zh: 這位年輕的游泳選手如今是奧運金牌的有力競爭者。

w920.en: The geographical **contiguity** of the two nations encouraged close trade and frequent travel.
w920.zh: 這兩國地理上的相鄰促進了密切的貿易與頻繁的往來。

w921.en: Their farmland is **contiguous** with the national park along its western boundary.
w921.zh: 他們的農田沿著西側邊界與國家公園相鄰。

w922.en: After the operation, the patient gradually regained full **continence** within a few weeks.
w922.zh: 手術後，這名病患在幾週內逐漸恢復了完全的排泄控制能力。

w923.en: The manager prepared a backup plan for every possible **contingency** during the launch.
w923.zh: 經理為發布期間每一種可能發生的意外事件都準備了備用方案。

w924.en: A small **contingent** of soldiers was sent to guard the remote border post.
w924.zh: 一支小型的分遣隊被派去守衛這個偏遠的邊境哨所。

w925.en: The board voted in favour of the **continuance** of the popular training programme.
w925.zh: 董事會投票贊成這項廣受歡迎的訓練計畫繼續進行。

w926.en: The film's sequel was a natural **continuation** of the story told in the original.
w926.zh: 這部電影的續集是原作所講述故事的自然延續。

w927.en: There must be **continuity** between chapters so that readers can follow the argument easily.
w927.zh: 各章節之間必須有連貫性，讀者才能輕鬆地跟上論證的脈絡。

w928.en: The patient was kept under **continuous** observation throughout the entire night.
w928.zh: 這名病患在整個夜晚都被置於持續的觀察之下。

w929.en: His face seemed to **contort** with pain as he limped slowly off the field.
w929.zh: 當他一瘸一拐地慢慢走下球場時，他的臉似乎因疼痛而扭曲。

w930.en: Customs officers seized a large quantity of **contraband** hidden inside the lorry's panels.
w930.zh: 海關人員查獲了大量藏在卡車車板內的走私違禁品。

w931.en: There is a clear **contradiction** between what he says and what he actually does.
w931.zh: 他所說的和他實際所做的之間存在著明顯的矛盾。

w932.en: The two witnesses gave **contradictory** accounts of what happened that evening.
w932.zh: 這兩名證人對那天晚上發生的事提供了相互矛盾的說法。

w933.en: In logic, **contraposition** lets us restate a statement by negating and swapping its terms.
w933.zh: 在邏輯學中，換質位法讓我們透過否定並對調命題的詞項來重述一個陳述。

w934.en: Building so close to the river would clearly **contravene** local planning laws.
w934.zh: 如此靠近河邊興建房屋顯然會違反當地的規劃法規。

w935.en: Her generous **contribution** to the charity helped fund a new children's library.
w935.zh: 她對這家慈善機構慷慨的捐款，幫助資助了一座新的兒童圖書館。

w936.en: She became a regular **contributor** to the magazine, submitting one article every month.
w936.zh: 她成為這本雜誌的固定撰稿人，每個月投稿一篇文章。

w937.en: He looked genuinely **contrite** and quietly apologised for the trouble he had caused.
w937.zh: 他看起來真心悔恨，並為自己造成的麻煩低聲道歉。

w938.en: The escape was made possible by an ingenious **contrivance** built from spare parts.
w938.zh: 這次逃脫得以實現，靠的是一個用零件拼湊而成的巧妙裝置。

w939.en: Somehow she always **contrives** to finish her work just before the strict deadline.
w939.zh: 不知怎地，她總是設法在嚴格的截止期限前剛好完成她的工作。

w940.en: A skilled rider learns to **control** a nervous horse with gentle, steady hands.
w940.zh: 一位熟練的騎士學會用溫和而穩定的雙手來控制一匹緊張的馬。

w941.en: The air-traffic **controller** calmly guided dozens of planes safely onto the runway.
w941.zh: 那位航空管制員沉著地引導數十架飛機安全降落到跑道上。

w942.en: The **contumacious** witness repeatedly refused to answer the judge's direct questions.
w942.zh: 這名抗拒的證人一再拒絕回答法官直接提出的問題。

w943.en: His open **contumacy** towards the court eventually led to a charge of contempt.
w943.zh: 他對法庭公然的藐視最終導致了一項藐視法庭的指控。

w944.en: She slipped on the ice and managed to badly **contuse** her left elbow.
w944.zh: 她在冰上滑倒，左手肘嚴重挫傷。

w945.en: The doctor examined the dark **contusion** spreading across the patient's bruised knee.
w945.zh: 醫生檢查了在病患瘀傷膝蓋上蔓延的深色挫傷。

w946.en: She went to the seaside to **convalesce** quietly after her long and difficult illness.
w946.zh: 在經歷漫長而艱難的病痛後，她去海邊靜靜地休養康復。

w947.en: His **convalescence** lasted several weeks, during which he was advised to rest completely.
w947.zh: 他的康復期持續了好幾週，期間醫生建議他完全靜養。

w948.en: The hospital has a quiet **convalescent** ward where recovering patients can rest peacefully.
w948.zh: 這家醫院有一間安靜的療養病房，讓康復中的病患能夠平靜地休息。

w949.en: The chairman will **convene** an emergency meeting to discuss the sudden budget cuts.
w949.zh: 主席將召開一場緊急會議，以討論這次突如其來的預算刪減。

w950.en: For greater **convenience**, the bank now lets customers deposit cheques using their phones.
w950.zh: 為了更加便利，這家銀行現在讓客戶可以用手機存入支票。

w951.en: Several mountain paths gradually **converge** at a single viewpoint near the summit.
w951.zh: 幾條山徑在接近山頂處逐漸會合於同一個觀景點。

w952.en: The two species developed similar wings through a striking case of **convergent** evolution.
w952.zh: 這兩個物種透過一個引人注目的趨同演化案例，發展出相似的翅膀。

w953.en: She is thoroughly **conversant** with the latest research in marine biology.
w953.zh: 她對海洋生物學的最新研究非常熟悉。

w954.en: The **conversion** of the old warehouse into flats took nearly two years to complete.
w954.zh: 將這座舊倉庫改建成公寓花了將近兩年才完成。

w955.en: On warm afternoons he loves driving his bright red **convertible** along the coast.
w955.zh: 在溫暖的午後，他喜歡開著他那輛鮮紅色的敞篷車沿著海岸兜風。

w956.en: The polished **convex** lens magnified the tiny insect for the curious schoolchildren.
w956.zh: 這片拋光的凸透鏡為好奇的學童們放大了那隻微小的昆蟲。

w957.en: In the countryside, a bicycle is often the cheapest and most practical **conveyance**.
w957.zh: 在鄉間，自行車往往是最便宜且最實用的交通工具。

w958.en: We enjoyed a warm and **convivial** dinner with old friends and plenty of laughter.
w958.zh: 我們與老朋友共進了一頓溫馨歡樂的晚餐，充滿了歡聲笑語。

w959.en: The plot's many **convolutions** made the mystery novel surprisingly difficult to follow.
w959.zh: 情節的諸多曲折離奇使這本推理小說出乎意料地難以跟上。

w960.en: The vine began to **convolve** tightly around the wooden post in the garden.
w960.zh: 這株藤蔓開始緊緊地纏繞在花園裡的木柱上。

w961.en: A long **convoy** of trucks carried emergency supplies towards the flooded region.
w961.zh: 一支長長的卡車車隊載運著緊急物資前往洪水氾濫的地區。

w962.en: The audience began to **convulse** with laughter at the comedian's absurd impressions.
w962.zh: 觀眾開始因這位喜劇演員荒謬的模仿而笑得渾身發抖。

w963.en: The high fever triggered a sudden **convulsion**, alarming the child's worried parents.
w963.zh: 高燒引發了一陣突如其來的抽搐，讓孩子憂心的父母大為驚慌。

w964.en: She took **copious** notes throughout the lecture, filling several pages in her notebook.
w964.zh: 她在整堂講座中做了大量的筆記，寫滿了筆記本好幾頁。

w965.en: The play features a charming **coquette** who flirts playfully with every guest at the party.
w965.zh: 這齣戲以一位迷人賣弄風情的女子為主角，她在派對上與每位賓客俏皮地調情。

w966.en: An elegant carved **cornice** ran around the top of the grand ballroom walls.
w966.zh: 一道優雅的雕刻飛簷環繞著這座宏偉舞廳牆面的頂部。

w967.en: The autumn market offered a **cornucopia** of fresh fruit, vegetables, and homemade bread.
w967.zh: 這個秋季市集提供了豐盛的新鮮水果、蔬菜和自製麵包。

w968.en: Higher fuel prices are a natural **corollary** of the growing global demand for oil.
w968.zh: 燃料價格上漲是全球石油需求增長的必然結果。

w969.en: Thousands gathered in the square to witness the young king's lavish **coronation**.
w969.zh: 數千人聚集在廣場上，見證這位年輕國王盛大的加冕典禮。

w970.en: The young princess wore a delicate silver **coronet** at the formal state banquet.
w970.zh: 這位年輕的公主在正式的國宴上戴著一頂精緻的銀製小王冠。

w971.en: Many schools have now abandoned **corporal** punishment in favour of gentler disciplinary methods.
w971.zh: 如今許多學校已廢除體罰，轉而採用較溫和的紀律管教方式。

w972.en: The new chief executive promised to reshape the entire **corporate** culture of the firm.
w972.zh: 新任執行長承諾要重塑整家公司的企業文化。

w973.en: Some philosophers question whether the mind is truly separate from our **corporeal** existence.
w973.zh: 有些哲學家質疑心靈是否真的與我們有形的肉體存在彼此分離。

w974.en: A small medical **corps** was deployed to treat the wounded near the front line.
w974.zh: 一支小型的醫療隊被部署到前線附近，以救治傷患。

w975.en: Detectives carefully examined the **corpse** before removing it from the crime scene.
w975.zh: 偵探們在將屍體移離犯罪現場之前仔細地檢驗了它。

w976.en: The doctor warned the rather **corpulent** patient to lose weight for his heart.
w976.zh: 醫生警告這位相當肥胖的病患，為了他的心臟著想必須減重。

w977.en: Each red blood **corpuscle** carries oxygen from the lungs to tissues throughout the body.
w977.zh: 每個紅血球都將氧氣從肺部輸送到全身的組織。

w978.en: Researchers found that exercise levels strongly **correlate** with overall mental wellbeing in adults.
w978.zh: 研究人員發現，運動量與成年人整體的心理健康有著密切的相關性。

w979.en: In this sentence, "either" and "or" function as a pair of **correlative** conjunctions.
w979.zh: 在這個句子中，「either」和「or」作為一對關聯連接詞使用。

w980.en: The early draft contained several **corrigible** errors that the editor soon fixed.
w980.zh: 這份初稿包含了幾個可改正的錯誤，編輯很快就修正了它們。

w981.en: Two independent witnesses came forward to **corroborate** the driver's account of the accident.
w981.zh: 兩名獨立的證人出面證實了這位駕駛對於事故的說法。

w982.en: The new fingerprint evidence offered strong **corroboration** of the detective's original theory.
w982.zh: 這項新的指紋證據為偵探最初的推論提供了有力的確證。

w983.en: Salty sea air can slowly **corrode** the metal frames of seaside buildings.
w983.zh: 含鹽的海風會慢慢腐蝕海邊建築物的金屬框架。

w984.en: Years of **corrosion** had eaten deep holes into the ship's rusting iron hull.
w984.zh: 多年的腐蝕已在這艘船生鏽的鐵製船殼上蝕出了深深的孔洞。

w985.en: The factory stores its highly **corrosive** chemicals in specially sealed containers.
w985.zh: 這家工廠將它具有高度腐蝕性的化學品儲存在特製的密封容器中。

w986.en: Critics argued that the underpaid officials were dangerously **corruptible** by wealthy interests.
w986.zh: 批評者認為這些薪資過低的官員很容易被有錢的利益團體拖下水。

w987.en: Widespread **corruption** among officials slowed the country's economic progress for many years.
w987.zh: 官員間普遍的貪汙腐敗使這個國家的經濟發展停滯了多年。

w988.en: The changes to the website were purely **cosmetic** and improved nothing about its speed.
w988.zh: 網站的這些改動純粹是表面工夫，對其速度毫無改善。

w989.en: Astronomers study faint **cosmic** rays that travel vast distances across empty space.
w989.zh: 天文學家研究那些穿越廣袤太空、傳播極遠距離的微弱宇宙射線。

w990.en: Ancient **cosmogony** sought to explain how the world and the heavens first came into being.
w990.zh: 古代的宇宙進化論試圖解釋這個世界與諸天最初是如何形成的。

w991.en: Early **cosmography** combined careful observation of the stars with imaginative maps of the heavens.
w991.zh: 早期的宇宙結構學將對星辰的仔細觀察與富想像力的天界地圖結合在一起。

w992.en: Modern **cosmology** explores how the universe began and how it continues to expand.
w992.zh: 現代宇宙學探討宇宙是如何起源的，以及它如何持續膨脹。

w993.en: London is a truly **cosmopolitan** city, home to people from almost every nation.
w993.zh: 倫敦是一座真正的國際大都會，居住著來自幾乎每個國家的人們。

w994.en: Her travels abroad gradually shaped a broad sense of **cosmopolitanism** and cultural openness.
w994.zh: 她在國外的旅行逐漸塑造了一種寬廣的世界主義與文化開放的胸襟。

w995.en: Ancient thinkers imagined the **cosmos** as a vast and perfectly ordered system.
w995.zh: 古代的思想家將宇宙想像成一個浩瀚且秩序井然的體系。

w996.en: In response, the defendant filed a **counter-claim** demanding damages for breach of contract.
w996.zh: 作為回應，被告提出了反訴，要求賠償違約所造成的損失。

w997.en: Adding lime to the soil can help **counteract** its natural acidity over time.
w997.zh: 在土壤中加入石灰，能隨著時間幫助抵消其天然的酸性。

w998.en: Lower export sales were partly **counterbalanced** by a sharp rise in domestic demand.
w998.zh: 出口銷售的下滑部分被國內需求的大幅上升所抵消。

w999.en: The general ordered his troops to **countercharge** before the enemy could regroup.
w999.zh: 將軍下令他的部隊在敵人重整旗鼓之前發動反攻。

w1000.en: Customs officers seized hundreds of **counterfeit** watches bearing well-known luxury brand names.
w1000.zh: 海關人員查獲了數百支印有知名奢侈品牌名稱的偽造手錶。

w1001.en: The minister met her French **counterpart** to discuss the new trade agreement.
w1001.zh: 那位部長與她的法國對應官員會面，討論新的貿易協定。

w1002.en: The government imposed new tariffs to **countervail** the effect of cheap imports.
w1002.zh: 政府徵收新關稅，以抵銷廉價進口商品帶來的影響。

w1003.en: The old merchant spent long evenings working alone in his cramped **counting-house**.
w1003.zh: 那位老商人常在他狹小的帳房裡獨自工作到深夜。

w1004.en: Abroad, he was always delighted to meet a fellow **countryman** from his hometown.
w1004.zh: 在國外，他總是很高興遇到來自家鄉的同胞。

w1005.en: It was a **courageous** decision to report the corruption despite the obvious risks.
w1005.zh: 儘管風險顯而易見，舉報貪腐仍是一個勇敢的決定。

w1006.en: She enrolled in an evening **course** to improve her academic writing skills.
w1006.zh: 她報名參加了一個晚間課程，以提升自己的學術寫作能力。

w1007.en: The knight rode a swift **courser** that easily outpaced the other horses.
w1007.zh: 那位騎士騎著一匹迅捷的駿馬，輕易地超越了其他馬匹。

w1008.en: He thanked the staff with great **courtesy** for their patient and helpful service.
w1008.zh: 他十分有禮貌地感謝員工們耐心而周到的服務。

w1009.en: The two nations signed a **covenant** promising to protect each other's borders.
w1009.zh: 兩國簽署了一份盟約，承諾保護彼此的邊界。

w1010.en: The journalist uncovered a **covert** operation that the agency had kept secret for years.
w1010.zh: 那名記者揭露了一項該機構多年來一直保密的秘密行動。

w1011.en: A **covey** of partridges suddenly burst from the bushes as we walked past.
w1011.zh: 當我們走過時，一小群鷓鴣突然從灌木叢中飛了出來。

w1012.en: The frightened children began to **cower** in the corner during the loud thunderstorm.
w1012.zh: 在猛烈的雷雨中，受驚的孩子們開始蜷縮在角落裡。

w1013.en: The **coxswain** shouted commands as the rowing crew pulled together toward the finish.
w1013.zh: 當划船隊員齊力划向終點時，舵手大聲喊著口令。

w1014.en: Climbers carefully scaled the steep **crag** that towered above the narrow valley.
w1014.zh: 攀登者小心翼翼地攀上那座聳立在狹窄山谷之上的陡峭懸崖。

w1015.en: The fall caused a hairline fracture in the patient's **cranium**, doctors reported.
w1015.zh: 醫生報告說，那次跌倒導致病人的頭顱出現了一道細微的裂縫。

w1016.en: His **crass** remark about her weight offended everyone sitting at the dinner table.
w1016.zh: 他那句關於她體重的失禮話語，冒犯了餐桌上的每一個人。

w1017.en: After months abroad, she had a strong **craving** for her mother's home cooking.
w1017.zh: 在國外待了幾個月後，她非常渴望吃到母親做的家常菜。

w1018.en: The old wooden stairs gave a loud **creak** every time someone climbed them.
w1018.zh: 每當有人爬上那座舊木樓梯時，它都會發出響亮的嘎吱聲。

w1019.en: The village **creamery** produces fresh butter and cheese from local dairy farms.
w1019.zh: 那座鄉村乳品廠用當地酪農場的牛奶生產新鮮的奶油和起司。

w1020.en: The chef poured a smooth, **creamy** sauce over the freshly baked potatoes.
w1020.zh: 廚師將滑順的鮮奶油醬汁淋在剛烤好的馬鈴薯上。

w1021.en: The newly discovered documents lend **credence** to the historian's controversial theory.
w1021.zh: 新發現的文件為這位歷史學家具爭議的理論提供了支持。

w1022.en: The witness gave a **credible** account that the jury found entirely convincing.
w1022.zh: 那名證人提供了可信的陳述，陪審團認為完全令人信服。

w1023.en: Some **credulous** investors believed the scheme would double their money overnight.
w1023.zh: 一些輕信的投資者相信這個計畫能讓他們的錢一夜翻倍。

w1024.en: Members of the group share a common **creed** based on tolerance and respect.
w1024.zh: 這個團體的成員共享一套以寬容與尊重為基礎的信條。

w1025.en: The town debated whether to build a new **crematory** near the old cemetery.
w1025.zh: 鎮上正在討論是否要在舊墓園附近興建一座新的火葬場。

w1026.en: The mountaineer nearly fell into a deep **crevasse** hidden beneath the snow.
w1026.zh: 那名登山者差點跌入一道隱藏在雪下的深裂縫中。

w1027.en: Tiny plants somehow managed to grow in every **crevice** of the stone wall.
w1027.zh: 一些細小的植物竟設法在石牆的每一道裂縫中生長。

w1028.en: Price was the main **criterion** the committee used when selecting the supplier.
w1028.zh: 價格是委員會挑選供應商時所採用的主要標準。

w1029.en: The professor wrote a sharp **critique** of the author's latest economic argument.
w1029.zh: 那位教授對作者最新的經濟論點寫了一篇尖銳的評論。

w1030.en: She carefully washed the delicate **crockery** before placing it back on the shelf.
w1030.zh: 她仔細清洗那些精緻的陶器，然後把它們放回架子上。

w1031.en: The war became a **crucible** that tested the young soldier's courage and resolve.
w1031.zh: 那場戰爭成了一場嚴峻的考驗，磨煉著這名年輕士兵的勇氣與決心。

w1032.en: She led a tireless **crusade** to improve education in the poorest rural districts.
w1032.zh: 她領導了一場不懈的運動，致力於改善最貧困鄉村地區的教育。

w1033.en: Crabs and lobsters are examples of the many **crustacean** species in the ocean.
w1033.zh: 螃蟹和龍蝦是海洋中眾多甲殼類物種的例子。

w1034.en: The fossil revealed a **crustaceous** outer shell that had hardened over millions of years.
w1034.zh: 那塊化石顯露出一層歷經數百萬年硬化的甲殼狀外殼。

w1035.en: The spy struggled to decode the secret **cryptogram** hidden inside the letter.
w1035.zh: 那名間諜費力地解讀藏在信件中的秘密密碼。

w1036.en: A long discussion helped the vague proposal finally **crystallize** into a clear plan.
w1036.zh: 一場長時間的討論讓那個模糊的提案最終成形為一個清晰的計畫。

w1037.en: The guard raised his heavy **cudgel** to threaten the approaching intruders.
w1037.zh: 那名守衛舉起他沉重的短棍，威嚇逼近的入侵者。

w1038.en: She enrolled in a famous school to develop her **culinary** skills professionally.
w1038.zh: 她進入一所著名學校，以專業地培養自己的烹飪技藝。

w1039.en: Officials decided to **cull** the weakest deer to protect the rest of the herd.
w1039.zh: 官員們決定撲殺最虛弱的鹿，以保護鹿群中的其餘成員。

w1040.en: The report found the manager directly **culpable** for the factory's serious safety failures.
w1040.zh: 報告認定那名經理應對工廠嚴重的安全疏失直接負責。

w1041.en: Police soon identified the **culprit** responsible for the string of office burglaries.
w1041.zh: 警方很快查出了應對一連串辦公室竊案負責的罪魁禍首。

w1042.en: Heavy rain blocked the **culvert** running beneath the railway, flooding the nearby road.
w1042.zh: 大雨堵塞了鐵路下方的涵洞，淹沒了附近的道路。

w1043.en: His **cupidity** led him to cheat his own partners out of their savings.
w1043.zh: 他的貪婪使他騙走了自己合夥人的積蓄。

w1044.en: Doctors assured her that the infection was entirely **curable** with proper medication.
w1044.zh: 醫生向她保證，只要用對藥物，這種感染是完全可以治癒的。

w1045.en: The museum **curator** arranged the ancient artefacts into a fascinating new exhibition.
w1045.zh: 那位博物館館長將古代文物布置成一場引人入勝的新展覽。

w1046.en: She bought a delicate jade **curio** from a small shop in the old town.
w1046.zh: 她在老城區的一家小店買了一件精緻的玉製古玩。

w1047.en: The teacher praised the elegant **cursive** script in which the letter was written.
w1047.zh: 老師稱讚那封信所用的優雅草書字體。

w1048.en: He gave the report only a **cursory** glance before signing it without question.
w1048.zh: 他只草草地看了那份報告一眼，就毫無疑問地簽了字。

w1049.en: Her **curt** reply made it clear she had no interest in further discussion.
w1049.zh: 她簡短失禮的回答清楚地表明，她無意再做進一步的討論。

w1050.en: The company decided to **curtail** spending to survive the difficult economic period.
w1050.zh: 公司決定縮減開支，以度過艱難的經濟時期。

w1051.en: The young dancer made a graceful **curtsy** as the audience applauded warmly.
w1051.zh: 當觀眾熱情鼓掌時，那名年輕舞者優雅地行了個屈膝禮。

w1052.en: The biologist studied the **cycloid** scales covering the body of the small fish.
w1052.zh: 那名生物學家研究覆蓋在小魚身上的圓盤狀鱗片。

w1053.en: A single grey **cygnet** followed its mother across the calm lake at dawn.
w1053.zh: 黎明時分，一隻灰色的幼天鵝跟著母親游過平靜的湖面。

w1054.en: Years of broken promises left him deeply **cynical** about every politician's true motives.
w1054.zh: 多年來一再落空的承諾，讓他對每個政客的真實動機都深感憤世嫉俗。

w1055.en: His constant **cynicism** about charities made colleagues reluctant to discuss donations with him.
w1055.zh: 他對慈善機構一貫的憤世嫉俗，讓同事們不願與他討論捐款。

w1056.en: In her bright red dress, she was the **cynosure** of the entire party.
w1056.zh: 穿著鮮紅洋裝的她，是整場派對中最引人注目的人。

w1057.en: The firefighter made a **daring** rescue, carrying the child through the burning building.
w1057.zh: 那名消防員進行了一次大膽的救援，抱著孩子穿過燃燒的建築。

w1058.en: The lecture explained how **Darwinism** changed the way scientists understood living species.
w1058.zh: 那場講座解釋了達爾文主義如何改變科學家理解生物物種的方式。

w1059.en: Everyone despised the **dastard** who abandoned his friends at the first sign of danger.
w1059.zh: 大家都鄙視那個一見危險就拋下朋友的懦夫。

w1060.en: Each **datum** in the survey was carefully checked before the analysis began.
w1060.zh: 在分析開始之前，調查中的每一條資料都經過仔細核對。

w1061.en: The **dauntless** explorer pressed on toward the summit despite the freezing wind.
w1061.zh: 那名無畏的探險家不顧刺骨的寒風，繼續朝著山頂前進。

w1062.en: The foreman hired an extra **day-man** to finish the urgent repairs by evening.
w1062.zh: 工頭多雇了一名日工，以便在傍晚前完成緊急的修繕工作。

w1063.en: There is a real **dearth** of affordable housing in many large coastal cities.
w1063.zh: 許多大型沿海城市嚴重缺乏負擔得起的住房。

w1064.en: A painted **death's-head** on the bottle warned workers that the liquid was poisonous.
w1064.zh: 瓶身上畫的骷髏頭警告工人，這種液體有毒。

w1065.en: He refused to **debase** himself by lying to win the committee's approval.
w1065.zh: 他拒絕為了贏得委員會的認可而說謊貶低自己。

w1066.en: Whether the policy truly helps the poor remains highly **debatable** among economists.
w1066.zh: 這項政策是否真能幫助窮人，在經濟學家之間仍極具爭議。

w1067.en: The **debonair** host charmed every guest with his easy smile and witty conversation.
w1067.zh: 那位風度翩翩的主人以輕鬆的微笑和機智的談吐迷住了每一位賓客。

w1068.en: The young pianist made an impressive **debut** at the city's famous concert hall.
w1068.zh: 那名年輕鋼琴家在該市著名的音樂廳進行了令人印象深刻的首演。

w1069.en: The students learned to calculate the interior angles of a regular **decagon**.
w1069.zh: 學生們學會計算正十邊形的內角。

w1070.en: The recipe required precisely one **decagram** of the rare imported spice.
w1070.zh: 這道食譜需要恰好十公克那種稀有的進口香料。

w1071.en: The tank held exactly one **decaliter** of water for the laboratory experiment.
w1071.zh: 那個水槽裝有恰好十升的水，供實驗室實驗使用。

w1072.en: The professor explained how the **decalogue** shaped early ideas about law and morality.
w1072.zh: 那位教授解釋了十誡如何塑造了早期關於法律與道德的觀念。

w1073.en: The literature class studied several lively tales from the famous **Decameron**.
w1073.zh: 那堂文學課研讀了著名《十日談》中幾個生動的故事。

w1074.en: The surveyor marked a distance of one **decameter** along the muddy riverbank.
w1074.zh: 測量員沿著泥濘的河岸標出了十米的距離。

w1075.en: The dishonest clerk chose to **decamp** with the cash before anyone noticed.
w1075.zh: 那名不誠實的職員選擇在任何人發覺之前帶著現金偷偷溜走。

w1076.en: In ancient times, rulers would **decapitate** prisoners as a public punishment.
w1076.zh: 在古代，統治者會將囚犯斬首作為公開的懲罰。

w1077.en: Shrimp and crabs are familiar examples of **decapod** crustaceans living in the sea.
w1077.zh: 蝦和蟹是生活在海中常見的十腳類甲殼動物的例子。

w1078.en: The poet wrote each line as a steady **decasyllable** to keep the rhythm regular.
w1078.zh: 那位詩人將每一行寫成穩定的十音節詩行，以保持節奏整齊。

w1079.en: The court found that years of careful **deceit** had hidden the company's huge losses.
w1079.zh: 法庭認定，多年精心的欺騙掩蓋了該公司的巨額虧損。

w1080.en: His **deceitful** promises eventually cost him the trust of all his closest friends.
w1080.zh: 他那些欺騙的承諾最終讓他失去了所有至交好友的信任。

w1081.en: Advertisers sometimes use clever images to **deceive** customers about a product's real quality.
w1081.zh: 廣告商有時會用巧妙的影像來欺騙顧客，掩蓋產品真正的品質。

w1082.en: He had the **decency** to apologise sincerely after realising his careless mistake.
w1082.zh: 在意識到自己粗心的錯誤後，他還算正派，誠懇地道了歉。

w1083.en: They finally found a **decent** apartment at a price they could comfortably afford.
w1083.zh: 他們終於找到了一間像樣的公寓，價格也是他們能輕鬆負擔的。

w1084.en: Most **deciduous** trees shed their colourful leaves as the cold autumn approaches.
w1084.zh: 大多數落葉樹會在寒冷的秋天來臨時落下它們色彩繽紛的葉子。

w1085.en: The teacher showed the class how to convert a fraction into a **decimal**.
w1085.zh: 老師向全班示範如何把分數轉換成小數。

w1086.en: A single harsh winter can **decimate** the region's vulnerable bird population.
w1086.zh: 一個嚴酷的冬天就可能大量消滅該地區脆弱的鳥類族群。

w1087.en: Historians struggled to **decipher** the faded inscription carved into the ancient stone.
w1087.zh: 歷史學家費力地辨認刻在古代石頭上那段已褪色的銘文。

w1088.en: Her quick, **decisive** action prevented the small fire from spreading any further.
w1088.zh: 她迅速而果斷的行動阻止了那場小火進一步蔓延。

w1089.en: The actor's passionate **declamation** moved the entire audience to sudden applause.
w1089.zh: 那名演員慷慨激昂的朗誦使全場觀眾突然爆出掌聲。

w1090.en: His **declamatory** style suited the rally, though it felt too dramatic for a classroom.
w1090.zh: 他那慷慨激昂的風格適合集會，但用在教室裡卻顯得過於誇張。

w1091.en: In grammar, a **declarative** sentence simply states a fact rather than asking a question.
w1091.zh: 在文法中，陳述句只是陳述一個事實，而非提出問題。

w1092.en: Latin learners often struggle with the complex **declension** of its many nouns.
w1092.zh: 拉丁文學習者常為其眾多名詞複雜的詞形變化所苦。

w1093.en: They chose to **decorate** the hall with bright flowers for the wedding reception.
w1093.zh: 他們選擇用鮮豔的花朵來裝飾大廳，以舉辦婚宴。

w1094.en: The guests maintained a **decorous** silence throughout the solemn memorial ceremony.
w1094.zh: 在整場莊嚴的追悼儀式中，賓客們保持著得體的靜默。

w1095.en: Hunters placed a wooden duck as a **decoy** to attract the passing birds.
w1095.zh: 獵人放置了一隻木製鴨子作為誘餌，以吸引飛過的鳥兒。

w1096.en: The family lived in a **decrepit** cottage with a leaking roof and broken windows.
w1096.zh: 那家人住在一間破舊的小屋裡，屋頂漏水，窗戶也破了。

w1097.en: Her years of quiet **dedication** to the project finally earned widespread recognition.
w1097.zh: 她多年來對這個專案默默的奉獻，終於贏得了廣泛的肯定。

w1098.en: From the muddy footprints, the detective could **deduce** the intruder's likely escape route.
w1098.zh: 從泥濘的腳印中，偵探得以推斷出入侵者可能的逃跑路線。

w1099.en: Vandals tried to **deface** the historic monument with spray paint overnight.
w1099.zh: 破壞者試圖在一夜之間用噴漆毀損那座歷史性的紀念碑。

w1100.en: The trusted accountant was caught trying to **defalcate** funds from the charity.
w1100.zh: 那名受信任的會計被當場抓到企圖盜用慈善機構的款項。

w1101.en: The actor sued the magazine for **defamation** after it printed false accusations.
w1101.zh: 那名演員在雜誌刊登不實指控後，控告其誹謗。

w1102.en: He warned that spreading such rumours could seriously **defame** an innocent person.
w1102.zh: 他警告說，散布這樣的謠言可能會嚴重詆毀一個無辜的人。

w1103.en: The software keeps the original settings unless you change them from the **default**.
w1103.zh: 除非你更改預設值，否則這個軟體會保留原本的設定。

w1104.en: The **defendant** sat quietly in court while the prosecutor presented the evidence.
w1104.zh: 當檢察官出示證據時，被告靜靜地坐在法庭上。

w1105.en: Her decision seemed perfectly **defensible** given the limited information available at the time.
w1105.zh: 考慮到當時可得的資訊有限，她的決定看來完全合乎情理。

w1106.en: He grew **defensive** whenever anyone questioned the accuracy of his research findings.
w1106.zh: 每當有人質疑他研究結果的準確性時，他就變得很有戒心。

w1107.en: The committee decided to **defer** its final decision until the next monthly meeting.
w1107.zh: 委員會決定將最終決定推遲到下個月的會議。

w1108.en: Out of **deference** to the elderly guests, the music was kept fairly quiet.
w1108.zh: 出於對年長賓客的尊重，音樂的音量保持得相當輕柔。

w1109.en: The workers remained **defiant**, refusing to return until their demands were finally met.
w1109.zh: 工人們依舊堅持對抗，拒絕復工，直到他們的要求最終得到滿足。

w1110.en: A serious **deficiency** in vitamin D can weaken the bones over time.
w1110.zh: 嚴重缺乏維生素D會隨著時間使骨骼變弱。

w1111.en: Their diet was seriously **deficient** in the vitamins needed for healthy growth.
w1111.zh: 他們的飲食嚴重缺乏健康成長所需的維生素。

w1112.en: She gave a **definite** answer, leaving no room for further doubt or confusion.
w1112.zh: 她給了一個明確的答案，沒有留下任何疑問或混淆的餘地。

w1113.en: The thick metal shield was designed to **deflect** bullets away from the soldiers.
w1113.zh: 那面厚重的金屬盾牌是設計來使子彈偏離士兵的。

w1114.en: Companies that **deforest** huge areas often damage the habitats of countless animals.
w1114.zh: 大面積砍伐森林的公司往往會破壞無數動物的棲息地。

w1115.en: Intense heat can easily **deform** the plastic, leaving it twisted and useless.
w1115.zh: 高溫很容易使塑膠變形，讓它扭曲而無法使用。

w1116.en: Early treatment helped correct the child's foot **deformity** before he learned to walk.
w1116.zh: 早期治療幫助矯正了那孩子的足部畸形，趕在他學會走路之前。

w1117.en: The con artist tried to **defraud** elderly residents of their hard-earned pensions.
w1117.zh: 那名騙子試圖詐騙年長居民辛苦掙來的退休金。

w1118.en: The university agreed to **defray** the travel costs of the visiting researchers.
w1118.zh: 校方同意支付來訪研究人員的差旅費用。

w1119.en: The novel describes the gradual **degeneracy** of a once-respected aristocratic family.
w1119.zh: 這部小說描寫了一個曾備受敬重的貴族家庭逐漸的墮落。

w1120.en: Without proper care, the friendly debate began to **degenerate** into a bitter quarrel.
w1120.zh: 由於缺乏妥善處理，那場友好的辯論開始退化成一場激烈的爭吵。

w1121.en: Losing his job and home brought him to a state of complete **degradation**.
w1121.zh: 失去工作和住所使他陷入了徹底落魄的境地。

w1122.en: Such cruel comments only **degrade** the people they are aimed at.
w1122.zh: 這樣殘忍的言論只會貶低他們所針對的對象。

w1123.en: Intense heat can quickly **dehydrate** hikers who forget to drink enough water.
w1123.zh: 高溫會迅速使忘記補充足夠水分的健行者脫水。

w1124.en: Ancient cultures often **deify** powerful rulers, worshipping them long after their deaths.
w1124.zh: 古代文化常將強大的統治者神化，在他們死後仍長期崇拜。

w1125.en: The busy director would not even **deign** to answer the junior clerk's question.
w1125.zh: 那位忙碌的主管甚至不屑於回答那名基層職員的問題。

w1126.en: As a **deist**, he believed God created the universe but rarely interfered afterwards.
w1126.zh: 身為自然神論者，他相信上帝創造了宇宙，但此後鮮少干預。

w1127.en: Ancient Greeks worshipped many a **deity** believed to control nature and human fate.
w1127.zh: 古希臘人崇拜許多被認為掌管自然與人類命運的神祇。

w1128.en: The repeated rejections began to **deject** the once-hopeful young writer.
w1128.zh: 接連的退稿開始使那名曾滿懷希望的年輕作家感到沮喪。

w1129.en: A deep sense of **dejection** settled over the team after the unexpected defeat.
w1129.zh: 在那場意外的失敗之後，一股深深的沮喪籠罩著整支隊伍。

w1130.en: The bakery offered a tray of **delectable** pastries that no one could resist.
w1130.zh: 那家麵包店端出一盤令人無法抗拒的美味糕點。

w1131.en: The concert was a source of pure **delectation** for the music-loving audience.
w1131.zh: 那場音樂會為熱愛音樂的觀眾帶來了純粹的愉悅。

w1132.en: Scientists warned that the chemical could have a **deleterious** effect on marine life.
w1132.zh: 科學家警告說，這種化學物質可能對海洋生物產生有害的影響。

w1133.en: Fresh truffles are considered a rare **delicacy** in many fine restaurants.
w1133.zh: 新鮮松露在許多高級餐廳裡被視為一種稀有的美食。

w1134.en: The report tries to **delineate** the main causes of the recent housing crisis.
w1134.zh: 這份報告試圖勾畫出近期住房危機的主要成因。

w1135.en: Left in the humid air, the salt crystals slowly began to **deliquesce**.
w1135.zh: 被留在潮濕的空氣中，那些鹽晶體慢慢開始溶化。

w1136.en: The high fever left the patient **delirious** and unable to recognise his family.
w1136.zh: 高燒使那名病人神志不清，無法認出自己的家人。

w1137.en: He continued to **delude** himself into thinking the failing business would soon recover.
w1137.zh: 他不斷欺騙自己，以為那家走下坡的公司很快就會復甦。

w1138.en: A sudden **deluge** flooded the streets and trapped commuters for several hours.
w1138.zh: 一場突如其來的暴雨淹沒了街道，使通勤者受困了好幾個小時。

w1139.en: He lived under the **delusion** that everyone secretly admired his obvious talent.
w1139.zh: 他活在一種錯覺中，以為人人都暗自欽佩他顯而易見的才華。

w1140.en: A strong magnetic field can **demagnetize** the data stored on an old hard drive.
w1140.zh: 強烈的磁場會將儲存在舊硬碟上的資料去磁。

w1141.en: The **demagogue** stirred up the crowd with angry promises he never intended to keep.
w1141.zh: 那名煽動家用他從未打算兌現的憤怒承諾煽動群眾。

w1142.en: Throughout the tense interview, she maintained a calm and professional **demeanor**.
w1142.zh: 在整場緊張的面試中，她始終保持冷靜而專業的神態舉止。

w1143.en: Days without sleep left him **demented**, muttering wildly to himself in the corridor.
w1143.zh: 連日無眠使他精神錯亂，在走廊裡瘋狂地對自己喃喃自語。

w1144.en: Despite its low cost, the plan had one serious **demerit** that worried investors.
w1144.zh: 儘管成本低廉，這個計畫卻有一個讓投資者擔憂的嚴重缺陷。

w1145.en: Poor management led to the rapid **demise** of the once-successful family firm.
w1145.zh: 管理不善導致這家曾經成功的家族企業迅速垮臺。

w1146.en: The government began to **demobilize** thousands of troops once the long war ended.
w1146.zh: 漫長的戰爭一結束，政府就開始讓數千名士兵復員。

w1147.en: The council voted to **demolish** the old factory and build affordable flats instead.
w1147.zh: 議會投票決定拆除那座舊工廠，改建負擔得起的公寓。

w1148.en: The link between the two events is clear and easily **demonstrable** with data.
w1148.zh: 這兩起事件之間的關聯很明確，用數據就能輕易證明。

w1149.en: The experiment was designed to **demonstrate** how plants respond to changes in light.
w1149.zh: 這項實驗旨在演示植物如何對光線的變化作出反應。

w1150.en: By nature she was warm and **demonstrative**, hugging friends whenever they met.
w1150.zh: 她天性熱情而感情外露，每次與朋友見面都會擁抱他們。

w1151.en: A friendly **demonstrator** at the fair showed visitors how the new machine worked.
w1151.zh: 展會上一位親切的示範者向參觀者展示這台新機器如何運作。

w1152.en: The pharmacist recommended a gentle **demulcent** to soothe the patient's sore throat.
w1152.zh: 藥劑師推薦了一種溫和的緩和劑來舒緩病人的喉嚨痛。

w1153.en: The shipping company charged heavy **demurrage** when the cargo was unloaded too slowly.
w1153.zh: 當貨物卸載過慢時，那家航運公司收取了高額的滯期費。

w1154.en: The coral formed a **dendroid** structure that resembled a tiny underwater tree.
w1154.zh: 那片珊瑚形成了一種樹木狀的結構，宛如一棵小小的水下樹木。

w1155.en: Her research in **dendrology** focused on how tropical trees adapt to drought.
w1155.zh: 她在樹木學上的研究聚焦於熱帶樹木如何適應乾旱。

w1156.en: The owl is a familiar **denizen** of the quiet woodland near our village.
w1156.zh: 貓頭鷹是我們村莊附近那片寧靜林地中常見的居民。

w1157.en: The contract required all payments to be **denominate** in the local currency.
w1157.zh: 這份合約要求所有款項都以當地貨幣計值。

w1158.en: The collector kept old coins of every **denomination** from the previous century.
w1158.zh: 那名收藏家保存著上個世紀各種面額的舊錢幣。

w1159.en: To add the fractions, the students first found a common **denominator**.
w1159.zh: 為了把這些分數相加，學生們先找出了一個共同的分母。

w1160.en: On maps, a small blue line is often used to **denote** a river.
w1160.zh: 在地圖上，一條小小的藍線常用來表示河流。

w1161.en: The film's surprising **denouement** finally revealed who had committed the crime.
w1161.zh: 那部電影出人意料的結局終於揭曉了是誰犯下了罪行。

w1162.en: Several leaders rose to **denounce** the violence and demand an immediate ceasefire.
w1162.zh: 幾位領袖站出來譴責這場暴力，並要求立即停火。

w1163.en: The dentist recommended a fluoride **dentifrice** to help protect the children's teeth.
w1163.zh: 牙醫推薦使用含氟牙膏，以幫助保護孩子們的牙齒。

w1164.en: Heavy logging can completely **denude** a hillside of its protective tree cover.
w1164.zh: 大量伐木會使山坡上保護性的樹木覆蓋完全裸露。

w1165.en: The public **denunciation** of the corrupt official appeared on every front page.
w1165.zh: 對那名貪腐官員的公開譴責登上了每一份報紙的頭版。

w1166.en: Years of overfishing can rapidly **deplete** the once-abundant stocks in coastal waters.
w1166.zh: 多年的過度捕撈會迅速耗盡沿海水域曾經豐富的魚群。

w1167.en: The refugees were living in **deplorable** conditions without clean water or shelter.
w1167.zh: 那些難民生活在極其惡劣的環境中，沒有乾淨的水或棲身之所。

w1168.en: Many citizens openly **deplore** the government's decision to cut education funding.
w1168.zh: 許多市民公開譴責政府削減教育經費的決定。

w1169.en: The grammar lesson explained that a **deponent** verb has a passive form but active meaning.
w1169.zh: 那堂文法課解釋說，異態動詞具有被動的形式卻有主動的意義。

w1170.en: Years of famine and war began to **depopulate** the once-thriving border region.
w1170.zh: 多年的饑荒與戰爭開始使這個曾經繁榮的邊境地區人口銳減。

w1171.en: The authorities threatened to **deport** the workers to their home country immediately.
w1171.zh: 當局威脅要立即將那些工人遣送回他們的祖國。

w1172.en: The old school placed great importance on each student's posture and **deportment**.
w1172.zh: 那所老學校非常重視每個學生的姿態與儀態。

w1173.en: The witness gave a detailed **deposition** describing exactly what she had seen.
w1173.zh: 那名證人提供了詳細的書面證詞，準確描述了她所目睹的一切。

w1174.en: The bank promised every **depositor** that their savings were completely safe.
w1174.zh: 銀行向每一位存款人保證，他們的存款完全安全。

w1175.en: Rare manuscripts are stored in a climate-controlled **depository** beneath the library.
w1175.zh: 珍稀手稿被存放在圖書館下方一個恆溫控制的倉庫裡。

w1176.en: Critics argued that violent films could gradually **deprave** impressionable young viewers.
w1176.zh: 批評者認為，暴力電影可能逐漸使易受影響的年輕觀眾墮落。

w1177.en: Senior officials publicly **deprecate** any attempt to weaken the existing safety rules.
w1177.zh: 高層官員公開反對任何企圖削弱現行安全規定的做法。

w1178.en: New cars usually **depreciate** sharply during their very first year of ownership.
w1178.zh: 新車通常在擁有的頭一年裡就大幅貶值。

w1179.en: The accountant calculated the annual **depreciation** of the company's ageing machinery.
w1179.zh: 會計師計算了公司老化機器的年度折舊。

w1180.en: The constant grey weather seemed to **depress** everyone working in the office.
w1180.zh: 那持續不斷的灰暗天氣似乎使辦公室裡的每個人都感到憂鬱。

w1181.en: After losing her job, she struggled with deep **depression** for several months.
w1181.zh: 失去工作後，她與深沉的憂鬱搏鬥了好幾個月。

w1182.en: Divers were amazed by the rich variety of life at such great **depth**.
w1182.zh: 潛水員對如此深的海底竟有如此豐富多樣的生命感到驚嘆。

w1183.en: The family bought the **derelict** house cheaply and slowly restored its faded charm.
w1183.zh: 那家人廉價買下了那棟廢棄的房子，慢慢修復了它褪色的魅力。

w1184.en: Rival scientists were quick to **deride** his theory as hopelessly naive.
w1184.zh: 與他競爭的科學家很快就嘲笑他的理論幼稚得無可救藥。

w1185.en: His clumsy excuse was so **derisible** that the whole room burst out laughing.
w1185.zh: 他笨拙的藉口可笑到讓全場的人都哄堂大笑。

w1186.en: The dictionary explains the **derivation** of each word from its ancient roots.
w1186.zh: 這本詞典說明了每個單字從其古老詞根而來的起源。

w1187.en: Critics dismissed the film as **derivative**, offering nothing the audience had not seen before.
w1187.zh: 評論家批評這部電影缺乏獨創性，沒有提供任何觀眾未曾見過的東西。

w1188.en: Many modern medicines **derive** their key ingredients from rare tropical plants.
w1188.zh: 許多現代藥物的關鍵成分都源自稀有的熱帶植物。

w1189.en: She specialised in **dermatology** to help patients with serious chronic skin conditions.
w1189.zh: 她專攻皮膚學，以幫助患有嚴重慢性皮膚病的病人。

w1190.en: Workers used the tall **derrick** to lift heavy containers onto the waiting ship.
w1190.zh: 工人們用那座高大的長臂吊車把沉重的貨櫃吊到等候的船上。

w1191.en: She is a direct **descendant** of one of the town's original founding families.
w1191.zh: 她是該鎮最初創建家族之一的直系後代。

w1192.en: Astronomers tracked the **descendent** path of the comet as it neared the sun.
w1192.zh: 天文學家追蹤那顆彗星在接近太陽時的下降軌跡。

w1193.en: He was proud to be of Scottish **descent** through his mother's family.
w1193.zh: 他為自己透過母親那邊的家族擁有蘇格蘭血統而感到自豪。

w1194.en: From the high tower, the guard could just **descry** ships on the distant horizon.
w1194.zh: 從高塔上，那名守衛勉強能望見遠方地平線上的船隻。

w1195.en: The young soldier was punished for trying to **desert** his unit during the battle.
w1195.zh: 那名年輕士兵因在戰鬥中企圖擅離部隊而受到處罰。

w1196.en: They placed a small **desiccant** packet inside the box to keep the contents dry.
w1196.zh: 他們在盒子裡放了一小包乾燥劑，以保持內容物乾燥。

w1197.en: The council voted to **designate** the old harbour as a protected historic site.
w1197.zh: 議會投票將那座舊港口指定為受保護的歷史遺址。

w1198.en: The judge ordered the company to **desist** from polluting the nearby river immediately.
w1198.zh: 法官命令該公司立即停止污染附近的河流。

w1199.en: Counsellors encourage gradual **desistance** from harmful habits rather than sudden change.
w1199.zh: 輔導員鼓勵逐步戒除有害的習慣，而非突然的改變。

w1200.en: In utter **despair**, she watched the floodwaters rise toward her family home.
w1200.zh: 在徹底的絕望中，她看著洪水朝她家的方向不斷上漲。

w1201.en: The sheriff finally captured the **desperado** who had terrorised the small frontier town.
w1201.zh: 警長終於抓住了那個讓邊境小鎮人心惶惶的亡命徒。

w1202.en: The flood victims were **desperate** for clean water, food, and dry shelter.
w1202.zh: 那些水災災民非常需要乾淨的水、食物和乾燥的棲身之所。

w1203.en: Everyone agreed his **despicable** treatment of the staff deserved serious punishment.
w1203.zh: 大家都同意他對待員工的可憎行為應受到嚴厲的懲罰。

w1204.en: **Despite** the heavy rain, the volunteers continued planting trees all afternoon.
w1204.zh: 儘管下著大雨，志工們整個下午仍持續種樹。

w1205.en: After three failed attempts, he began to **despond** about ever passing the exam.
w1205.zh: 在三次失敗的嘗試之後，他開始對自己能否通過考試感到沮喪。

w1206.en: She grew increasingly **despondent** about her chances of finding suitable work.
w1206.zh: 她對自己找到合適工作的機會越來越感到沮喪。

w1207.en: The ageing **despot** ruled the country through fear, ignoring his people's suffering.
w1207.zh: 那名年邁的專制者透過恐懼統治國家，無視人民的苦難。

w1208.en: Years of cruel **despotism** finally drove the exhausted people to open rebellion.
w1208.zh: 多年殘酷的暴政最終使疲憊的人民走向公開的反叛。

w1209.en: The war left thousands of families completely **destitute** and dependent on aid.
w1209.zh: 那場戰爭使數千個家庭一貧如洗，只能依賴援助。

w1210.en: He made only a **desultory** effort to study, jumping randomly between subjects.
w1210.zh: 他只是漫無目的地讀書，在各個科目之間隨意跳來跳去。

w1211.en: Harsh penalties are meant to **deter** drivers from speeding on residential streets.
w1211.zh: 嚴厲的罰則旨在阻止駕駛人在住宅區街道上超速。

w1212.en: The patient's condition began to **deteriorate** rapidly despite the doctors' best efforts.
w1212.zh: 儘管醫生竭盡全力，病人的病情仍開始迅速惡化。

w1213.en: The contract sets a **determinate** period of two years for the trial project.
w1213.zh: 這份合約為這個試驗性專案設定了兩年的明確期限。

w1214.en: Her quiet **determination** helped her finish the marathon despite the painful injury.
w1214.zh: 她沉靜的決心幫助她忍著疼痛的傷勢跑完了馬拉松。

w1215.en: The high fines act as a powerful **deterrent** against illegal dumping of waste.
w1215.zh: 高額罰款對非法傾倒廢棄物起到了強大的威懾作用。

w1216.en: She came to **detest** the constant noise from the busy road outside her window.
w1216.zh: 她漸漸憎恨窗外那條繁忙道路傳來的持續噪音。

w1217.en: A few careless errors did little to **detract** from her excellent overall performance.
w1217.zh: 幾個粗心的錯誤對她整體出色的表現幾乎沒有什麼損害。

w1218.en: He worked long hours to the obvious **detriment** of his health and family.
w1218.zh: 他長時間工作，明顯損害了自己的健康與家庭。

w1219.en: The miners used machines to **detrude** the heavy rock blocking the narrow tunnel.
w1219.zh: 礦工們用機器把堵住狹窄隧道的沉重岩石推了出去。

w1220.en: The pilot was warned never to **deviate** from the approved flight path.
w1220.zh: 飛行員被警告絕不可偏離核准的飛行路線。

w1221.en: The boys were full of harmless **devilry**, playing tricks on their patient teacher.
w1221.zh: 那些男孩滿是無傷大雅的惡作劇，老愛捉弄他們有耐心的老師。

w1222.en: He used **devious** tactics to gain control of the company from his partners.
w1222.zh: 他用會算計的手段從合夥人手中奪取了公司的控制權。

w1223.en: Engineers worked overnight to **devise** a clever solution to the cooling problem.
w1223.zh: 工程師們徹夜工作，巧妙地構思出解決冷卻問題的辦法。

w1224.en: As a **devout** believer, she attended the temple faithfully every single morning.
w1224.zh: 身為一名虔誠的信徒，她每天清晨都忠實地到寺廟參拜。

w1225.en: The traffic on the motorway was absolutely **diabolic** during the holiday weekend.
w1225.zh: 在那個假日週末，高速公路上的交通糟糕透頂。

w1226.en: The textbook explained each **diacritical** mark used to show the correct pronunciation.
w1226.zh: 這本教科書解釋了用來標示正確發音的每個變音符號。

w1227.en: Doctors were able to **diagnose** her illness as a rare blood disorder.
w1227.zh: 醫生得以將她的病診斷為一種罕見的血液疾病。

w1228.en: An early **diagnosis** of the disease greatly improved the patient's chances of recovery.
w1228.zh: 對該疾病的早期診斷大大提高了病人康復的機會。

w1229.en: In remote villages, people still speak an old **dialect** rarely heard elsewhere.
w1229.zh: 在偏遠的村莊裡，人們仍說著一種別處罕聞的古老方言。

w1230.en: As a skilled **dialectician**, she could argue convincingly on either side of any issue.
w1230.zh: 身為一名熟練的辯證家，她能就任何議題的正反兩方都辯得令人信服。

w1231.en: The play features a sharp **dialogue** between two characters with opposing views.
w1231.zh: 這齣戲呈現了兩個觀點對立的角色之間一段犀利的對話。

w1232.en: She wore a light, **diaphanous** scarf that fluttered gently in the summer breeze.
w1232.zh: 她圍著一條輕薄透明的圍巾，在夏日的微風中輕輕飄動。

w1233.en: Oxygen normally exists in the air as a **diatomic** molecule of two atoms.
w1233.zh: 氧氣在空氣中通常以由兩個原子組成的雙原子分子形式存在。

w1234.en: The columnist launched a furious **diatribe** against the city's wasteful spending habits.
w1234.zh: 那名專欄作家對該市浪費的開支習慣展開了猛烈的抨擊。

w1235.en: The coach often repeated his favourite **dictum** that hard work beats raw talent.
w1235.zh: 那名教練常重複他最愛的格言：努力勝過天賦。

w1236.en: The novel felt too **didactic**, lecturing readers instead of simply telling a story.
w1236.zh: 這部小說顯得過於說教，老在教訓讀者，而不是單純地講一個故事。

w1237.en: The teacher explained the subtle **difference** between the two similar-looking words.
w1237.zh: 老師解釋了那兩個外形相似的單字之間細微的差別。

w1238.en: In logic, the **differentia** is the feature that separates one species from another.
w1238.zh: 在邏輯學中，種差是區分一個物種與另一個物種的特徵。

w1239.en: The company offered a **differential** rate, charging more for faster delivery options.
w1239.zh: 這家公司提供有所區別的費率，更快的配送選項收費更高。

w1240.en: Young children gradually learn to **differentiate** between similar colours and shapes.
w1240.zh: 幼兒會逐漸學會區別相似的顏色和形狀。

w1241.en: Her natural **diffidence** made her hesitate before speaking up in large meetings.
w1241.zh: 她天生的羞怯使她在大型會議上發言前總會猶豫。

w1242.en: He felt **diffident** about sharing his ideas with such experienced colleagues.
w1242.zh: 面對如此資深的同事，他對分享自己的想法感到怯生生的。

w1243.en: The gas is highly **diffusible** and spreads quickly throughout the sealed room.
w1243.zh: 這種氣體極易擴散，能迅速瀰漫整個密閉的房間。

w1244.en: The rapid **diffusion** of new technology transformed daily life across the whole region.
w1244.zh: 新技術的迅速傳播改變了整個地區的日常生活。

w1245.en: Several foreign **dignitary** guests attended the grand opening of the new museum.
w1245.zh: 幾位外國要員出席了新博物館的盛大開幕儀式。

w1246.en: In English, the **digraph** "sh" represents a single sound made by two letters.
w1246.zh: 在英語中，二合字母「sh」代表由兩個字母發出的單一音。

w1247.en: The lecturer tended to **digress** from the topic, telling long personal stories.
w1247.zh: 那位講師常會離題，講起冗長的個人故事。

w1248.en: They rented a cheap but **dilapidated** flat with peeling paint and broken locks.
w1248.zh: 他們租了一間便宜卻破敗的公寓，油漆剝落，門鎖也壞了。

w1249.en: Bright light causes the pupils of the eyes to shrink rather than **dilate**.
w1249.zh: 強光會使眼睛的瞳孔收縮，而非擴張。

w1250.en: His **dilatory** approach to the project frustrated everyone waiting for a decision.
w1250.zh: 他對這個專案拖拖拉拉的做法讓所有等待決定的人都感到沮喪。

w1251.en: She faced a difficult **dilemma**: stay in a safe job or pursue her dream.
w1251.zh: 她面臨一個艱難的兩難境地：是留在穩定的工作，還是追求自己的夢想。

w1252.en: As a mere **dilettante**, he discussed art confidently but understood very little of it.
w1252.zh: 身為一個半吊子，他對藝術侃侃而談，卻其實所知甚少。

w1253.en: Her **diligence** and careful preparation earned her the highest marks in the exam.
w1253.zh: 她的勤奮與細心準備讓她在考試中取得了最高的分數。

w1254.en: You should **dilute** the concentrated juice with water before giving it to children.
w1254.zh: 在給孩子喝之前，你應該用水把濃縮果汁稀釋。

w1255.en: The report noted a steady **diminution** in the city's air pollution over five years.
w1255.zh: 報告指出，這座城市的空氣污染在五年間持續地減少。

w1256.en: The room was **dimly** lit, so we could barely read the small print.
w1256.zh: 房間裡光線昏暗，所以我們幾乎看不清那些小字。

w1257.en: In phonetics, a **diphthong** combines two vowel sounds within a single syllable.
w1257.zh: 在語音學中，雙母音是在一個音節內結合了兩個母音的發音。

w1258.en: Skilful **diplomacy** helped the two nations avoid war and reach a peaceful agreement.
w1258.zh: 高超的外交手腕幫助兩國避免了戰爭，並達成了和平協議。

w1259.en: The **diplomat** spent years representing his country at the embassy in Paris.
w1259.zh: 這位外交官在巴黎的大使館代表他的國家工作了多年。

w1260.en: She gave a **diplomatic** reply, carefully avoiding any comment that might offend them.
w1260.zh: 她給了一個委婉的回答，小心地避開任何可能冒犯他們的評論。

w1261.en: The experienced **diplomatist** negotiated calmly during the tense international crisis.
w1261.zh: 這位經驗豐富的外交官在緊張的國際危機中冷靜地進行談判。

w1262.en: Several experts **disagree** with the government's plan to raise university tuition fees.
w1262.zh: 幾位專家不同意政府提高大學學費的計畫。

w1263.en: The referee decided to **disallow** the goal because of an earlier handball.
w1263.zh: 裁判因為先前的一次手球而決定不承認那個進球。

w1264.en: Many small shops gradually **disappear** as large supermarkets open nearby.
w1264.zh: 隨著大型超市在附近開張，許多小商店逐漸消失。

w1265.en: I don't want to **disappoint** my parents, so I study hard every night.
w1265.zh: 我不想讓父母失望，所以我每天晚上都努力讀書。

w1266.en: Many residents strongly **disapprove** of the plan to build a factory here.
w1266.zh: 許多居民強烈反對在這裡建造工廠的計畫。

w1267.en: The treaty required both countries to **disarm** and reduce their nuclear weapons.
w1267.zh: 這項條約要求兩國裁軍並減少其核武器。

w1268.en: Someone had clearly **disarranged** the files, leaving papers scattered across the desk.
w1268.zh: 顯然有人弄亂了那些檔案，把文件散落得滿桌都是。

w1269.en: The minister tried to **disavow** any knowledge of the secret financial deal.
w1269.zh: 這位部長試圖聲稱對那筆秘密的金融交易毫不知情。

w1270.en: His public **disavowal** of the rumour did little to convince the sceptical journalists.
w1270.zh: 他公開否認那則謠言，卻幾乎無法說服那些抱持懷疑的記者。

w1271.en: As a lifelong **disbeliever**, she questioned every claim that lacked solid evidence.
w1271.zh: 身為一個終生抱持懷疑態度的人，她質疑每一項缺乏確實證據的主張。

w1272.en: Talking to a close friend can **disburden** your mind of worries and stress.
w1272.zh: 與好友傾訴可以卸下你心中的憂慮與壓力。

w1273.en: The charity will **disburse** the donated funds to families affected by the flood.
w1273.zh: 這個慈善機構會將捐款撥給受洪水影響的家庭。

w1274.en: Please **discard** any food that has passed its expiry date immediately.
w1274.zh: 請立即扔掉任何已經過了有效期限的食物。

w1275.en: There was no **discernible** difference between the two samples under the microscope.
w1275.zh: 在顯微鏡下，這兩個樣本之間沒有可辨別的差異。

w1276.en: He became a devoted **disciple** of the famous scientist after attending her lectures.
w1276.zh: 在聽過那位著名科學家的演講後，他成了她忠實的追隨者。

w1277.en: The company took **disciplinary** action against employees who repeatedly broke the rules.
w1277.zh: 公司對屢次違規的員工採取了懲戒措施。

w1278.en: Good teachers know how to **discipline** students fairly without humiliating them.
w1278.zh: 好老師懂得如何公平地訓導學生，而不羞辱他們。

w1279.en: The company tried to **disclaim** responsibility for the faulty products it sold.
w1279.zh: 這家公司試圖否認對其出售的瑕疵產品負有責任。

w1280.en: Strong sunlight can **discolor** curtains, leaving them faded after only a few months.
w1280.zh: 強烈的陽光會使窗簾褪色，只要幾個月就讓它們變得黯淡。

w1281.en: Her unexpected question seemed to **discomfit** the speaker, who paused awkwardly.
w1281.zh: 她出乎意料的問題似乎讓講者感到不安，他尷尬地停頓了下來。

w1282.en: He felt some **discomfort** in his back after sitting at the desk all day.
w1282.zh: 在書桌前坐了一整天後，他感到背部有些不適。

w1283.en: Remember to **disconnect** the heater before you clean it for safety.
w1283.zh: 為了安全，清潔暖氣前記得先切斷它的電源。

w1284.en: After losing the match, the young player looked utterly **disconsolate** in the corner.
w1284.zh: 輸掉比賽後，那名年輕球員在角落裡顯得無比沮喪。

w1285.en: The sudden **discontinuation** of the bus service left many commuters without transport.
w1285.zh: 公車服務的突然中止讓許多通勤者沒了交通工具。

w1286.en: There was deep **discord** among the committee members over how to spend the budget.
w1286.zh: 委員會成員之間對於如何運用預算存在著嚴重的看法不一致。

w1287.en: The headmaster sought to **discountenance** any behaviour that disrupted classroom learning.
w1287.zh: 校長設法反對任何擾亂課堂學習的行為。

w1288.en: Scientists hope to **discover** a cure for the disease within the next decade.
w1288.zh: 科學家希望能在未來十年內發現治療這種疾病的方法。

w1289.en: The leaked emails were used to **discredit** the politician before the election.
w1289.zh: 那些外洩的電子郵件在選舉前被用來損害這位政治人物的名譽。

w1290.en: Please be **discreet** about the news; we don't want it spreading yet.
w1290.zh: 請對這則消息謹慎一些；我們還不希望它傳開。

w1291.en: The witnesses gave **discrepant** accounts, making it hard to know what really happened.
w1291.zh: 證人們提供了不一致的說法，使人難以得知究竟發生了什麼事。

w1292.en: It is illegal for employers to **discriminate** against workers because of their age.
w1292.zh: 雇主因員工的年齡而歧視他們是違法的。

w1293.en: His essay was so **discursive** that the main argument was almost impossible to follow.
w1293.zh: 他的文章如此東拉西扯，以致幾乎無法看出其主要論點。

w1294.en: After a long **discussion**, the team finally agreed on a new marketing strategy.
w1294.zh: 經過長時間的討論，團隊終於就新的行銷策略達成了一致。

w1295.en: The new law could **disenfranchise** thousands of voters who lack proper identification.
w1295.zh: 這項新法律可能剝奪數千名缺乏有效身份證件的選民的投票權。

w1296.en: She slowly tried to **disengage** her hand from the child's tight grip.
w1296.zh: 她慢慢試著把手從孩子緊握的小手中鬆開。

w1297.en: His careless remarks earned him the **disfavor** of nearly every senior manager.
w1297.zh: 他輕率的言論招致了幾乎每一位高階主管的厭惡。

w1298.en: Ugly graffiti can badly **disfigure** the walls of historic public buildings.
w1298.zh: 難看的塗鴉會嚴重損毀歷史性公共建築的牆面。

w1299.en: She answered the door in a state of **dishabille**, still wearing her pyjamas.
w1299.zh: 她衣著隨便地去應門，身上還穿著睡衣。

w1300.en: It would be **dishonest** to claim credit for work you did not do.
w1300.zh: 把不是你做的工作攬為己功是不誠實的。

w1301.en: The harsh realities of the job soon began to **disillusion** the young teacher.
w1301.zh: 這份工作殘酷的現實很快開始讓這位年輕教師的幻想破滅。

w1302.en: Nurses must thoroughly **disinfect** the wound to prevent any infection.
w1302.zh: 護理師必須徹底為傷口消毒，以防止任何感染。

w1303.en: Use a strong **disinfectant** to clean the kitchen surfaces after preparing raw meat.
w1303.zh: 處理生肉後，請用強效的消毒劑清潔廚房的檯面。

w1304.en: His father threatened to **disinherit** him if he married against the family's wishes.
w1304.zh: 他的父親威脅說，如果他違背家人意願結婚，就要剝奪他的繼承權。

w1305.en: We need a **disinterested** judge who has no personal stake in the outcome.
w1305.zh: 我們需要一位對結果沒有個人利害關係、公正客觀的裁判。

w1306.en: The film's **disjunctive** narrative jumped between different times without any clear link.
w1306.zh: 這部電影不連貫的敘事在不同的時間之間跳躍，沒有任何清楚的連結。

w1307.en: He fell awkwardly and managed to **dislocate** his shoulder during the match.
w1307.zh: 他在比賽中笨拙地摔了一跤，結果使肩膀脫臼了。

w1308.en: The unfair **dismissal** of the loyal worker angered all of his colleagues.
w1308.zh: 這名忠誠員工遭到不公平的解僱，激怒了他所有的同事。

w1309.en: The riders had to **dismount** and lead their horses across the narrow bridge.
w1309.zh: 騎士們必須下馬，牽著馬走過那座狹窄的橋。

w1310.en: The teacher would not tolerate any **disobedience** during the school examinations.
w1310.zh: 老師在校內考試期間絕不容忍任何不服從的行為。

w1311.en: The **disobedient** puppy refused to sit no matter how often we commanded it.
w1311.zh: 這隻不聽話的小狗無論我們命令多少次都不肯坐下。

w1312.en: His family threatened to **disown** him after he ran away with the money.
w1312.zh: 在他帶著錢逃走後，他的家人威脅要與他斷絕關係。

w1313.en: Critics tried to **disparage** her novel as nothing more than cheap entertainment.
w1313.zh: 評論家試圖貶低她的小說，說它不過是廉價的娛樂罷了。

w1314.en: There is still a wide **disparity** in income between urban and rural families.
w1314.zh: 城市與鄉村家庭之間的收入差異仍然很大。

w1315.en: The teacher's calm explanation helped **dispel** the students' fears about the exam.
w1315.zh: 老師冷靜的解釋幫忙消除了學生對考試的恐懼。

w1316.en: The couple received special **dispensation** from the church to marry quietly.
w1316.zh: 這對夫婦獲得了教會的特許，得以低調地結婚。

w1317.en: The new dam will **displace** hundreds of villagers from their ancestral homes.
w1317.zh: 這座新水壩將迫使數百名村民離開他們祖傳的家園。

w1318.en: The settlers tried to **dispossess** the local people of their farmland.
w1318.zh: 這些殖民者試圖奪走當地人的農田。

w1319.en: The scholars engaged in a lively **disputation** about the meaning of the ancient text.
w1319.zh: 學者們就那篇古文的含義展開了一場熱烈的辯論。

w1320.en: A serious driving offence can **disqualify** you from holding a licence for years.
w1320.zh: 嚴重的駕駛違規可能會取消你持有駕照的資格達數年之久。

w1321.en: The strange noises from the basement began to **disquiet** the whole household.
w1321.zh: 地下室傳來的怪聲開始讓全家人感到不安。

w1322.en: The driver chose to **disregard** the warning signs and entered the closed road.
w1322.zh: 那名駕駛選擇無視警告標誌，駛入了封閉的道路。

w1323.en: The area gained a **disreputable** reputation because of its many illegal gambling dens.
w1323.zh: 這個地區因眾多非法賭場而落得名聲不佳。

w1324.en: The scandal brought the once-respected company into serious **disrepute**.
w1324.zh: 這樁醜聞使這家曾受敬重的公司嚴重失去了信譽。

w1325.en: The actors had to **disrobe** quickly backstage to change into their next costumes.
w1325.zh: 演員們得在後台迅速脫下外衣，換上下一套戲服。

w1326.en: Heavy snow is expected to **disrupt** train services across the region tomorrow.
w1326.zh: 預計明天大雪將擾亂整個地區的火車班次。

w1327.en: Long waiting times continue to **dissatisfy** patients at the busy clinic.
w1327.zh: 漫長的等候時間持續讓這家繁忙診所的病患感到不滿。

w1328.en: Biology students learn to **dissect** a frog in order to study its organs.
w1328.zh: 生物系學生學習解剖青蛙，以便研究牠的器官。

w1329.en: The careful **dissection** of the specimen revealed the structure of its nervous system.
w1329.zh: 對這個標本仔細的解剖揭示了它神經系統的結構。

w1330.en: He tried to **dissemble** his disappointment by smiling and congratulating the winner.
w1330.zh: 他試圖以微笑並恭喜贏家來掩飾自己的失望。

w1331.en: The organization uses social media to **disseminate** health information to rural communities.
w1331.zh: 該組織利用社群媒體向偏鄉社區傳播健康資訊。

w1332.en: Growing **dissension** within the party weakened its chances in the coming election.
w1332.zh: 黨內日益加劇的分歧削弱了它在即將到來的選舉中的勝算。

w1333.en: There was strong **dissent** among scientists about the safety of the new chemical.
w1333.zh: 科學家之間對於這種新化學品的安全性存在強烈的異議。

w1334.en: A few **dissentients** refused to sign the agreement that everyone else supported.
w1334.zh: 少數幾位不贊成的人拒絕在其他人都支持的協議上簽字。

w1335.en: His **dissentious** nature meant he argued bitterly at almost every staff meeting.
w1335.zh: 他好爭論的性格使他幾乎在每一次員工會議上都激烈爭吵。

w1336.en: She spent two years writing a **dissertation** on medieval trade routes.
w1336.zh: 她花了兩年時間撰寫一篇關於中世紀貿易路線的學位論文。

w1337.en: Spreading false rumours does a real **disservice** to honest local businesses.
w1337.zh: 散播不實謠言對誠實的當地企業造成了真正的危害。

w1338.en: War threatened to **dissever** the ancient ties between the two neighbouring towns.
w1338.zh: 戰爭有可能使這兩個相鄰城鎮之間古老的聯繫分裂。

w1339.en: Her painting style is not entirely **dissimilar** to that of her famous teacher.
w1339.zh: 她的繪畫風格與她那位著名老師的並非完全不同。

w1340.en: The morning fog will slowly **dissipate** once the sun rises higher.
w1340.zh: 一旦太陽升得更高，晨霧便會慢慢消散。

w1341.en: The gradual **dissipation** of the crowd left the square quiet and empty.
w1341.zh: 人群的逐漸散去使廣場變得安靜而空蕩。

w1342.en: He led a **dissolute** life of gambling and drinking that ruined his fortune.
w1342.zh: 他過著賭博與酗酒的放蕩生活，最終毀了他的財產。

w1343.en: The **dissolution** of the company left hundreds of employees suddenly unemployed.
w1343.zh: 公司的解散使數百名員工突然失業。

w1344.en: Sugar will quickly **dissolve** in a cup of hot tea.
w1344.zh: 糖會很快地溶解在一杯熱茶裡。

w1345.en: The harsh **dissonance** of the modern symphony unsettled many in the audience.
w1345.zh: 這部現代交響曲刺耳的不和諧音讓許多觀眾感到不安。

w1346.en: The choir produced a **dissonant** chord that made the listeners wince.
w1346.zh: 合唱團唱出了一個不和諧的和弦，讓聽眾皺起了眉頭。

w1347.en: Her friends tried hard to **dissuade** her from quitting such a secure job.
w1347.zh: 她的朋友們努力勸阻她，別辭去這麼穩定的工作。

w1348.en: Despite all their **dissuasion**, he insisted on investing in the risky venture.
w1348.zh: 儘管他們百般勸阻，他仍堅持要投資那項冒險的事業。

w1349.en: The word "table" is a **disyllable**, made up of two clear syllables.
w1349.zh: "table"這個字是雙音節詞，由兩個清楚的音節組成。

w1350.en: The vet warned that **distemper** can spread quickly among unvaccinated dogs.
w1350.zh: 獸醫警告說，犬瘟熱會在未接種疫苗的狗之間迅速傳播。

w1351.en: After the huge meal, his stomach began to **distend** uncomfortably.
w1351.zh: 在那頓大餐之後，他的肚子開始不舒服地鼓了起來。

w1352.en: The balloon's **distensible** material allows it to stretch far without bursting.
w1352.zh: 這個氣球可膨脹的材質讓它能大幅伸展而不破裂。

w1353.en: The doctor examined the painful **distention** of the patient's abdomen.
w1353.zh: 醫生檢查了病人腹部那令人疼痛的膨脹。

w1354.en: Workers heat the mixture to **distill** pure alcohol from the fermented grain.
w1354.zh: 工人加熱混合物，以從發酵的穀物中蒸餾出純酒精。

w1355.en: The **distillation** of seawater is one way to produce clean drinking water.
w1355.zh: 海水的蒸餾是製造潔淨飲用水的一種方法。

w1356.en: The local **distiller** has produced fine whisky in these hills for generations.
w1356.zh: 當地的烈酒生產商已在這片山丘上釀造優質威士忌好幾代了。

w1357.en: There is a clear **distinction** between knowing a language and speaking it fluently.
w1357.zh: 懂一種語言與能流利地說它之間有著明顯的區別。

w1358.en: Newspapers sometimes **distort** the facts to make a story sound more dramatic.
w1358.zh: 報紙有時會歪曲事實，讓一則報導聽起來更聳動。

w1359.en: The landlord obtained a court order to **distrain** the tenant's furniture for unpaid rent.
w1359.zh: 房東取得了法院命令，為了未付的租金而扣押房客的家具。

w1360.en: The **distrainor** arrived with documents allowing him to seize the debtor's property.
w1360.zh: 扣押人帶著文件前來，這些文件准許他扣押債務人的財產。
